description:

name: Cedar Lavender Men’s Oil Perfume
description:
A sharp, clean blend where Cedar’s strength meets the clarity of Lavender. Floral undertones and a touch of spice add depth, while fresh woods leave a crisp, polished finish. Refined yet effortless. 
FREE OF PHTHALATES, PROPYLENE GLYCOL, AND PARABENS 
 
 Top Notes: Green, Fresh, Floral 
 Heart Notes: Light, Spicy Licorice 
 Base Notes: Fresh Wood Shavings

name: Olibanum Citrus Men's Perfume
description:
Bright Lemon zest cuts through with a crisp, electric freshness, giving way to the cool, airy pull of marine currents. As it settles, Balsamic resins add a smooth, grounded depth—warm yet weightless. A sharp, modern take on citrus with a quiet, resinous intensity. 
FREE OF PHTHALATES, PROPYLENE GLYCOL, AND PARABENS 
 
 
 Top Notes: Lemon Zest 
 Heart Notes: Ozonic Marine Currents 
 Base Notes: Balsamic Resins
shortDescription:
Olibanum Citrus unfolds in layers, starting with the fresh, aromatic kick of basil and anise seeds, offering a vibrant and distinctive opening. As it evolves, the warmth of amber and the smooth sweetness of tonka beans create a comforting, luxurious heart. The base reveals earthy roots and deep woods, providing a grounded, masculine finish. 
 
FREE OF PHTHALATES, PROPYLENE GLYCOL, AND PARABENS 
 KEY INGREDIENTS

name: Tonka Vetiver Men's Perfume
description:
Sharp Basil and Anise seeds open with a green, aromatic edge, unfolding into the warm depth of Amber and Tonka Bean. As it lingers, earthy roots and dry woods ground the scent in a raw, understated elegance. Smooth, bold, and effortlessly refined. 
FREE OF PHTHALATES, PROPYLENE GLYCOL, AND PARABENS 
 
 
 TOP NOTES: Basil and Anise Seeds 
 HEART NOTES: Amber and Tonka Beans 
 BASE NOTES: Earthy Roots and Wood
shortDescription:
Tonka Vetiver opens with the fresh, aromatic kick of basil and anise seeds, offering an energising and distinctive first impression. As the scent evolves, the heart reveals the warmth of amber, blended seamlessly with the creamy sweetness of tonka beans—an irresistible contrast that feels both comforting and luxurious. Finally, the base unfolds with earthy roots and deep woods, grounding the fragrance with a rich, masculine finish. 
 
FREE OF PHTHALATES, PROPYLENE GLYCOL, AND PARABENS 
 KEY INGREDIENTS

name: Orange Patchouli Men’s Perfume
description:
Rich Blood Orange bursts open—vibrant, pulpy, and sunlit—before deepening into a heart of warm Oriental spice. As it settles, Patchouli unfolds with a dark, grounding warmth, leaving a bold yet refined finish. Bright, spiced, and unapologetically confident. 
FREE OF PHTHALATES, PROPYLENE GLYCOL, AND PARABENS 
 
 Top Notes: Blood Orange 
 Heart Notes: Oriental Spice 
 Base Notes: Warm Patchouli
shortDescription:
Orange Patchouli opens with the zest of blood orange, creating an immediate, refreshing impression. As the scent develops, the heart reveals rich oriental spices, adding warmth and intrigue. Finally, the fragrance settles into a deep, earthy base of warm patchouli. Ideal for those who seek a fragrance with vibrant energy and lasting depth. 
 
FREE OF PHTHALATES, PROPYLENE GLYCOL AND PARABENS 
 
TOP NOTES: Blood Orange 
HEART NOTES: Oriental Spice 
BASE NOTES: Warm Patchouli

Proceed to shave off your facial hair with your regular razor

 Not for sale in the UK and Channel Islands.

name: Lemongrass Mild Scrub Soap
description: This gentle scrub soap awakens the senses with a refreshing blend of Lemongrass Leaf Powder and Oil that exfoliates, nourishes, and revitalizes. Enriched with Organic Coconut Oil, Mahua Oil, and Mango Butter, it delivers deep hydration for skin that feels soft, smooth, and replenished, while Gingergrass and Palmarosa Oils add calming, soothing balance. With its bright yet grounding fragrance, this soap offers the perfect fresh start to your day.

Invigorating lemongrass scrub soap is hand crafted, natural, cold-pressed and triple-milled in a base of mango butter and other rich botanical extracts. The finely ground lemongrass leaf powder acts as a gentle exfoliating scrub. The fragrance is blended with natural essential oils giving your skin a revitalising and refreshing effect. Blended with pure Sandalwood Powder and natural essential oils, it exfoliates dead skin cells, cleanses gently, and imparts its elegant, earthy fragrance along with its natural Sandalwood color. name: Colibri Spiral (Pack of 2)
description:
Made with a blend of Lemongrass, Tea Tree, Peppermint, Vetiver and Neem traditionally used to keep mosquitoes at bay. These long-lasting spirals release a fresh, herbaceous aroma, making them perfect for evenings outdoors. Free from chemical insecticides, they provide a natural way to enjoy your space in peace. 
 
 Each coil burns for approximately 8 hours. 
 
 Includes a metal stand for easy use.
shortDescription:
Coils contain several essential oils and botanical extracts including Lemongrass Oil, Rosemary Oil, Cedar Oil, Thyme Oil, Geraniol, Cinnamon Oil, Clove Oil, traditionally used to keep mosquitos at bay. Each coil lasts for about 8 hours Contains no chemical insecticide. 
 
Not for sale in the UK and Channel Islands. 
 KEY INGREDIENTS

name: Lemongrass Dish Wash - 500ml
description:
BENEFITS 
Natural antibacterial dish wash that keeps your dishes sparkling clean and odorless. Its tough on grease but gentle on your hands. 
 
 HOW TO USE 
Dilute a few drops in a small bowl of water & stir up a nice foam. Dip scrubber in the solution, wash utensils clean & then rinse well. 
 
 FULL INGREDIENT LIST 
Aqua, Alpha olefin Sulphonates*, Cocamidopropyl beatine*, Disodium Laureth Sulpho Succinate*, Lauryl Glucoside*, Lenetol SWAK*, Natural vinegar, Natural Essential Oil Blend. *Naturally derived.
shortDescription:
Tough on grease, gentle on hands. This natural dish wash is powered by lemongrass and citrus essential oils, cutting through stains while leaving dishes spotless and odor-free. The fresh, clean scent lingers without harsh chemical residues. 
 
 Not for sale in the UK and Channel Islands. 
 KEY INGREDIENTS
categories: Home Essences > Everyday Essentials > Home Essentials > Hand Wash / Dish Wash

name: Lemongrass Hand Wash - 250ml
description:
BENEFITS 
A gentle hand wash that kills germs, eliminates odors and leaves them clean and pleasantly fragranced. 
 
 HOW TO USE 
Pump out hand wash onto wet hands, work up a rich lather, wash hands and under nails for a few seconds for best results. 
 
 FULL INGREDIENT LIST 
Aqua, Alpha olefin Sulphonates*, Cocamidopropyl beatine*, Poly Sorbate-20, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract, Sodium PCA*, Potassium Sorbate, Natural Essential Oil Blend. **Naturally derived.
shortDescription:
The fresh, citrusy scent of lemongrass creates a clean, refreshing hand wash that cleanses without drying. Aloe vera keeps your hands hydrated, leaving them feeling soft and refreshed. 
 
Key Ingredients: 
 
•Aloe Vera – Hydrates and soothes 
 
•Lemongrass Oil – Naturally purifying with a crisp, uplifting aroma 
 
•Essential Oil Blend – Enhances freshness and balance 
 KEY INGREDIENTS
categories: Home Essences > Everyday Essentials > Home Essentials > Hand Wash / Dish Wash

name: Cedarwood Incense Sticks
description:
Pack of 10 incense sticks. A deep, calming blend of Himalayan Cedarwood, crisp pine, and revitalizing Juniper—bringing the essence of a serene forest into your space. Earthy and grounding, this scent promotes relaxation and clarity, making it perfect for moments of stillness. Each 8″ incense stick is handcrafted in-house with wood powder and natural gum resin, completely free from charcoal for a clean and natural burn. Infused with our proprietary fragrance, blended with pure essential oils, it envelops your surroundings in a fresh, woodsy aroma. 
 
 Made with eco bamboo sticks and thoughtfully packaged in handmade recycled cotton paper with recyclable inner sleeves for lasting freshness. 
 100% Natural. No charcoal. No phthalates. Just pure, mindful fragrance. 
Burn time: 45 minutes per stick.
shortDescription:
Woody, Forest Fragrance 
Incense sticks are made in-house, which we roll with wood powder and gum resin, without charcoal. The finished sticks are then dipped into our proprietary fragrances, which have been blended with pure essential oils. We use eco bamboo sticks, handmade paper outer packing made from recycled cotton and recyclable double inner bags for best aroma retention. No Charcoal and No Phthalates 
 KEY INGREDIENTS
categories: Home Essences > Fragrance for Spaces > Incense > Encens D’auroville

description:
BENEFITS 
Relaxing and Calming. 
 
 HOW TO USE 
 
Pour into the bath tub as it is filling. 
 
Allow yourself 15 to 20 minutes to luxuriate in the soothing brew or use as a Foot Soak: Pour into bucket with warm water. 
 
Soak Feet for 10-15 minutes.

name: Aromatherapy Avocado and Apricot Serum - 50gms
description:
BENEFITS 
Moisturizing, Firms and protects from Environment damage. 
 
 HOW TO USE 
Apply on face and neck. 
 
 FULL INGREDIENT LIST 
Aqua (Demineralized Water), Persea Gratissima Oil (Avocado Oil), Glycerine*, Prunus Armeniaca Kernel Oil(Apricot Oil), Butyrospermum Parkii Butter (Shea Butter), Triticum Vulgare Germ Oil (Wheat Germ Oil), Corylus Avellana Seed Oil (Hazelnut Oil), , Hydrolyzed Lupine Protein**, Tocopherol[bg_collapse view="link" color="#4a4949" expand_text="+ Show More" collapse_text="- Show Less" ] (Vitamin E Natural), Dipalmitoyl hydroxyproline**, Glyceryl Stearate, Cetyl Alcohol, Coco Caprylate**, Dehydroacetic acid (and) Benzyl Alcohol***, Xanthan Gum, Pelargonium Graveolens Oil (Geranium Oil), Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Oil (Rosemary Oil), Lavandula Hybrida Oil(Lavandin Oil), Lavandula Angustifolia Oil (Lavender Oil), Citrus Aurantium Amara Oil (Petitgrain Oil), Pogostemon Cablin Oil (Patchouli Oil), Salvia Sclarea Oil (Clary sage Oil), Ravensara Aromatica Leaf Oil (Ravensara Oil), Boswellia Carteri Oil (Olibanum Oil), Curcuma Longa Root Oil (Turmeric Root Oil), Citrus Medica Limonum Oil(Lemon Oil), Daucus Carota Sativa Seed Oil(Carrot Seed Oil), Santalum Album Oil (Sandalwood oil), Rosa Damascena Flower Oil (Rose Absolute). * Vegetal **Naturally derived ***Eco cert approved preservative. [/bg_collapse]
shortDescription: Blended with apricot oil to smoothen wrinkles, while shea butter moisturizes the skin, and the sweet lupin peptide prevents further damage from UV light. Helps banish age spots and improve firmness and elasticity over time. This serum is a multitasker that addresses various signs of aging with every application. \n KEY INGREDIENTS \n

name: Turmeric Serum
description:
Designed to target hyperpigmentation and bring out your natural glow, this serum features Turmeric Root Extract at its core to help reduce dark spots and even out your skin tone. 
 The powerful combination of Masikai, Indian Barberry, and Licorice Extracts brighten your complexion while Grapeseed, Jojoba, and Avocado Oils provide essential moisture, leaving your skin nourished and balanced. 
 Further enriched with Pomegranate and Cucumber Extracts, along with invigorating oils of Sweet Orange, Lemon, and Grapefruit, this serum refreshes both skin and senses. 
 Perfect for everyday use, our Turmeric Serum is a highly effective solution for achieving a more even, radiant complexion.

name: Saffron Serum
description:
Enriched with Saffron extract, this serum brightens your complexion and promotes an even skin tone. The rich blend of Almond, Rosehip, Avocado, and Olive Oils delivers deep hydration, leaving your skin soft, supple, and nourished 
 
With the added benefits of Vitamin E and Grapeseed Oil, it helps shield your skin from environmental stressors, while calming essential oils like Lavender, Geranium, and Rosemary infuse your routine with a soothing aroma that enhances your self-care experience. Natural extracts like Water Lily and Turmeric revitalize your skin, promoting a youthful and radiant appearance. 
 
Ideal for everyday use, our Saffron Serum is your essential ally in achieving a brighter, nourished complexion.
shortDescription:
Enriched with Saffron extract, this serum brightens your complexion and promotes an even skin tone. The rich blend of Almond, Rosehip, Avocado, and Olive oils delivers deep hydration, leaving your skin feeling incredibly soft and supple. 
 
With the added power of Vitamin E and Grapeseed Oil, it shields your skin from environmental stressors, while calming essential oils like Lavender, Geranium, and Rosemary infuse your routine with a soothing aroma that enhances your self-care experience. The inclusion of natural extracts like Water Lily and Turmeric revitalizes your skin, promoting a youthful and radiant appearance. 
 
Ideal for everyday use, our Saffron Serum is your essential ally in achieving a brighter, nourished complexion. 
 
Not for sale in the UK and Channel Islands.

name: Moringa Serum
description:
Give your skin the love it deserves with our Moringa Face Serum. Make this serum your daily go-to for deeply nourishing, hydrating care, powered by the magic of Moringa Oleifera Seed Oil. Whether you’re dealing with dryness or just looking for a natural glow, the blend of Almond, Coconut, and Aloe Extracts delivers lasting moisture that soothes your skin, keeping it hydrated and youthful. 
 
Enriched with Grapeseed Oil and Kokum Butter, it locks in hydration without feeling heavy, leaving your skin soft and silky smooth. The added boost of Pomegranate extract promotes youthful radiance, while natural Vitamin E helps protect against everyday environmental stressors. 
 
Calming oils like Geranium, Lavandin, and Himalayan Cedarwood bring balance and relaxation to your skincare routine. Treat yourself to a moment of self-care each day, and let your skin feel the transformative difference.

name: Under Eye Serum with Water Lily Extract
description:
Gentle yet effective, this under-eye serum targets puffiness, dark circles, and fine lines. Enriched with Water Lily Extract and Cucumber Extract, it soothes and refreshes the delicate skin around your eyes, restoring a rested and well-hydrated appearance. 
 The formula is further enhanced with Quinoa Seed Extract and Sodium Hyaluronate to help firm and smooth the skin, while Vitamin E provides antioxidant protection. The blend of essential oils, including Lavender, Geranium, and Rosemary, adds a calming touch, supporting the serum’s rejuvenating effects. 
 Designed for daily use, this serum gives tired eyes a well-deserved boost, leaving them brighter and more awake. Perfect for anyone looking to restore their natural glow and keep fatigue at bay!
shortDescription:
This under-eye serum is gentle yet effective, created to tackle puffiness, dark circles, and fine lines. Enriched with Water Lily extract and Cucumber extract, it works to soothe and refresh the delicate skin around your eyes, giving it a rested, well-hydrated look. 
 
The formula is boosted with Quinoa Seed extract to help firm and smooth the skin, while Vitamin E provides antioxidant protection. The blend of essential oils, including Lavender, Geranium, and Rosemary, adds a calming touch, supporting the serum’s overall rejuvenating effects. 
 
Designed for daily use, this serum gives your eyes a well-deserved boost, leaving them looking brighter and more awake. Perfect for anyone looking to bring back that natural glow and keep tired eyes at bay!

name: Clear Mind Aromatherapy Incense – Pack of 10
description:
A fresh, stimulating blend of petitgrain, rosemary, lemon, basil, and cinnamon leaf to promote mental clarity and focus. Rosemary and basil help sharpen concentration, while petitgrain and lemon provide a crisp, refreshing lift. A touch of cinnamon leaf adds warmth, enhancing alertness and motivation. Perfect for work, study, or moments that call for clear thinking. 
Hand-rolled with wood powder and natural gum resin, made with 100% natural fragrance and pure essential oils—free from phthalates, propylene glycol, and charcoal for a clean, pure burn. 
Packaged in biodegradable cellophane and screen-printed handmade paper. 
Aroma benefits: Focus-enhancing, refreshing, mentally clarifying. 
Burn time: 60-70 minutes per stick.
shortDescription:
100% Natural. Each fragrance has been carefully crafted through a sensitive blending of many essential oils. They are composed and hand-blended using the classic art of balancing fragrance resonance and affinity. Through the balance and interplay of these properties, the resulting products come alive and exude aromas that promote a multiplicity of positive attributes that add new dimensions to home fragrance. No Phthalates,No Charcoal. 
Size:8" 
Burn Time: 45 Minutes. 
 KEY INGREDIENTS

name: Spring Rose Perfume Oil
description:
Bright, floral, and quietly powerful, Spring Rose opens with sparkling Citrus and light Geranium, awakening the senses with a fresh, uplifting brightness. The heart unfolds into petal-fresh Rose Absolute blended with soft green herbs, adding a graceful, aromatic elegance. Finally, earthy Vetiver, dry woods, and a hint of damp moss settle in, grounding the fragrance with a natural, enduring depth. 
 
 
 Scent Profile: 
 
 
 Top Note: Sparkling Citrus & Light Geranium – A lively, bright opening that energizes and refreshes. 
 Middle Note: Petal-Fresh Rose Absolute & Soft Green Herbs – Elegant and floral, with a gentle herbal nuance. 
 Base Note: Earthy Vetiver, Dry Woods & Damp Moss – Grounding and natural, leaving a lasting, sophisticated finish.
shortDescription: Step into a world where romance meets intrigue. Rose Attar centers on a lush bouquet of rose absolute, its deep, velvety petals unfolding into a complex tapestry of scent. Blue chamomile adds a soothing whisper of calm, while geranium lends a green, uplifting nuance that dances gracefully with the floral heart. A hint of amyris introduces a subtle woody embrace, perfectly complemented by the crisp vibrancy of palmarosa. Finally, a dash of clove weaves in a warm, spicy intrigue, making this fragrance an evocative journey of passion and serenity all at once.

name: Mystical Sandal Perfume Oil
description:
A fragrance that imbues a quiet moment of inner delight. It begins with a burst of fresh citrus, bright and invigorating, awakening the senses. As it unfolds, a soft bloom of rose emerges, timeless and serene, wrapping you in graceful elegance. Finally, musky, woody notes settle in, grounding the scent with a warm, lingering depth that soothes and comforts. 
 
 
 Scent Profile: 
 
 
 Top Note: Citrus – A vibrant, zesty opening that refreshes and uplifts. 
 Middle Note: Rose – Soft and refined, offering a classic floral heart with gentle richness. 
 Base Note: Musky, Woody – A warm, earthy finish that brings balance and lasting sensuality.

description:
Soft, warm, and irresistibly comforting, Vanilla Passion wraps you in pure indulgence. It opens with the sweetness of creamy Vanilla touched with bright citrus, creating a playful and uplifting start. As it unfolds, subtle spices of Cinnamon Leaf and Clove emerge, adding gentle warmth and complexity. The scent lingers with a velvety base of smooth vanilla bean and soft amber, leaving a mellow, sensual finish close to the skin.

 Top Note: Juicy Vanilla Fruit & Sweet Citrus - A bright, sweet opening that delights the senses. 
 Middle Note: Cinnamon Leaf & Clove - Warm and lightly spiced, with a creamy floral nuance. 
 Base Note: Smooth Vanilla Bean & Soft Amber - A rich, velvety finish that’s both soothing and sensual.

name: Night Blossom Perfume Oil
description:
A deep, velvety floral with a sensual edge, Night Blossom begins with the richness of Red Rose—lush, romantic, and undeniably timeless. The heart blooms into soft Tuberose, its creamy warmth adding depth and allure. As the fragrance settles, a base of mystic woods, infused with Olibanum and guaiac wood, casting a smoky, resinous aura that feels both grounding and mysterious. A fragrance that lingers like a whispered secret—elegant, intimate, and unforgettable. 
 
 Scent Profile: 
 
 
 Top Note: Red Rose – Bold and velvety, evoking classic romance and luxury. 
 Middle Note: Soft Tuberose – Creamy and luminous, adding depth and sensuality. 
 Base Note: Mystic Woods – A smoky, resinous blend of Olibanum and guaiac wood, deep and enduring.
shortDescription:
A deep, velvety floral with a sensual edge, Night Blossom opens with the richness of red rose—lush, opulent, and undeniably romantic. The heart unfolds into soft tuberose, its creamy glow adding warmth and depth. As it lingers, a base of mystic woods, touched with olibanum and guaiac wood, casts a smoky, resinous aura that feels both grounding and elusive. 
 
A fragrance that lingers like a whispered secret—elegant, intimate, and unforgettable. 
 
 Scent Profile 
 
 Top Note: Red Rose – A bold, velvety floral that exudes timeless romance. 
 
 Middle Note: Soft Tuberose – Creamy and luminous, adding depth and sensuality. 
 
 Base Note: Mystic Woods – A smoky, resinous blend of olibanum and guaiac wood, deep and lingering.

name: Opium Flower Perfume Oil
description:
Daring and sensual, Opium Flower is a bold oriental floral infused with warmth. It opens with the rich, comforting heat of Cinnamon and exotic spice, drawing you in with its intoxicating allure. At the heart, Crimson Rose and resin-rich Myrrh add depth and opulence. The fragrance settles into a smoldering base of dry Cedarwood, soft Amber, and smoky earth, leaving behind a velvety, lingering trail. 
 
 
Scent Profile: 
 
 
 Top Note: Warm Cinnamon & Exotic Spice – A fiery, aromatic opening full of warmth and intrigue. 
 Middle Note: Crimson Rose & Resin-Rich Myrrh – Deep, romantic florals balanced with rich, resinous depth. 
 Base Note: Dry Cedarwood, Soft Amber & Smoky Earth – A smoldering, velvety finish that lingers on the skin.

Without a bamboo core, this bambooless incense burns smoothly and purely, allowing the full depth of its warm, resinous scent to unfold. Long revered for its meditative and purifying qualities, frankincense creates a serene atmosphere ideal for reflection, prayer, or grounding rituals. 
Handcrafted with wood powder and natural resins, infused with 100% natural fragrance—free from charcoal for a clean, lasting burn. 
Includes a holder. 
Burn time: 60 minutes per stick.

name: Lavender Dreams Perfumed Sachet
description:
Soft and soothing, Lavender Dreams fills your space with the calming floral notes of lavender. Handmade with natural essential oils in wood powder, this hanging sachet is ideal for closets, wardrobes, and storage areas, keeping fabrics fresh and lightly fragrant. 
 
 HOW TO USE 
Remove from transparent outer wrap before use. Do not open paper sachet. Do not place on polished or synthetic surfaces. 
Keep out of reach of children and pets. External use only 
 
Will last for 4-6 weeks depending on ventilation 
and heat source.

name: Flower Blush Reed Diffuser-Madurai Frangipani
description:
BENEFITS 
- 
 
 HOW TO USE 
 
 Remove plug and replace cap. 
 Place reeds or flower wick into Jar. 
 The flower draws the fragrance and change color and continuees to release the fragrance even after the liquid is used up. 
 
 FULL INGREDIENT LIST 
-
shortDescription: The flower with the cotton wick and reeds draws up the tinted perfume, transforming the petals from ivory to a variety of colors depending on the scent tint, while diffusing the fragrance upwards and into the surrounding area. The flower is made from natural, soft Sola wood which is derived from the Tapioca plant. Each petal is individually hand carved, after which they are tied around a cotton wick to form a flower in full bloom. The reeds are made from rattan, which, through a capillary action, also draw up the perfume and release the fragrance. \n KEY INGREDIENTS \n

name: Reed Diffuser-Frangipani
description:
BENEFITS 
- 
 
 HOW TO USE 
 
 Remove the plastic lid. Insert the diffuser sticks into diffuser bottle. 
 Reeds will absorb the oil and diffuse fragrance into the air. 
 Please allow 24 hours for the fragrance to diffuse completely. To refresh the fragrance, remove the sticks and place the opposite ends into the oil. 
 
 FULL INGREDIENT LIST 
-
shortDescription: One of the most recent trends in the home fragrance market, these aromatic diffusers with fragrances blended with natural essential oils are flawless air fresheners that create a soothing atmosphere. \n KEY INGREDIENTS \n

name: Alpine Cedar Smudging Incense Wands
description:
Ground your energy and clear your space with the calming scent of Alpine Cedar. 
 
 What is Smudging? 
 Smudging is a spiritual practice of using herbal smoke to cleanse and purify spaces, objects, or oneself, helping to create a balanced, peaceful environment. 
 Key Benefits: Clears negative energy, promotes mental clarity and focus, grounds and calms 
 Features: 100% botanical ingredients, free from charcoal and phthalates, leaf-shaped wand for easy use
shortDescription:
Smudging is a spiritual process of passing a room, object, or even one’s self through cleansing herbal smoke as a path to redefinition and purification. Maroma’s handsome, handmade leaf incense wands are a respectful, charming, and convenient tribute to these ancient traditions. All ingredients are of botanical origin. No Charcoal and No Phthalates. 
 
Burn Time: 1 Hour. 
 KEY INGREDIENTS
categories: Home Essences > Fragrance for Spaces > Incense

description: Crafted with nourishing Coconut, Olive, and Calendula oils, this exceptionally gentle baby soap cleanses while preserving the skin’s natural softness. shortDescription:
This extremely mild triple milled, hand crafted, cold pressed soap, gently cleanses and soothes the most sensitive skin. Maroma baby soap is safe and gentle and can be used for the face and body. With its delicate blend of moisturising natural essential oils it leaves your baby's skin soft, cleansed and smelling fresh. 
 
100% Natural, Vegetarian, Sustainable, No Phthalates, No Sulphates, No synthetic fragrance or color, No Petroleum derivative, No Palm oil. 
 
Not for sale in the UK and Channel Islands.

description:
BENEFITS 
Helps quieten the mind, sharpen focus and enhance clarity. 
 
 HOW TO USE 
Add a few drops in your bath or in a natural vegetable oil to massage on your body. Sprinkle a few drops on your pillow or use in a diffuser.

name: Coconut Incense Sticks
description:
Pack of 10 incense sticks. A warm, tropical fragrance that blends the creamy sweetness of coconut with the lush floral notes of ylang ylang, the gentle spice of clove, and the soft, comforting richness of vanilla resinoid. Smooth and embracing, this scent evokes a sense of island serenity and soulful indulgence. Perfect for creating a cozy, uplifting atmosphere that soothes both heart and mind. Each 8″ incense stick is handcrafted in-house with wood powder and natural gum resin, completely free from charcoal for a clean and natural burn. Infused with our proprietary fragrance, blended with pure essential oils, it fills your space with a mellow, lingering aroma of natural comfort. 
 Made with eco bamboo sticks and thoughtfully packaged in handmade recycled cotton paper with recyclable inner bags for lasting freshness. 
 No charcoal. No phthalates. Just pure, mindful fragrance. Burn time: 45 minutes per stick.
shortDescription:
Warm resinous sweet notes 
8" Incense sticks are made in-house, which we roll with wood powder and gum resin, without charcoal. The finished sticks are then dipped into our proprietary fragrances, which have been blended with pure essential oils. We use eco bamboo sticks, handmade paper outer packing made from recycled cotton and recyclable double inner bags for best aroma retention. No Charcoal and No Phthalates. 
Burn Time:45 Minutes.

name: Recharge Massage Oil
description:
A luxurious blend of pure, plant-based oils, this formula leaves skin deeply moisturized, silky smooth, and subtly fragrant. 
At its heart, Sunflower, Sesame, and Apricot Oils deliver rich hydration, while Grapeseed and Wheatgerm Oils provide lightweight nourishment packed with essential antioxidants. Bright, zesty notes of Lemon, Orange, and Peppermint Oils instantly uplift and revitalize the senses. 
The calming essence of Lavender, Geranium, and Cedarwood Oils balances the energizing undertones, while warming hints ofCardamom, Clove, and Basil Oils ground the blend with soothing depth. 
Perfect for restorative massage or a self-care ritual, Recharge delivers an immersive experience for body and spirit, leaving you refreshed, centered, and glowing from within.
shortDescription:
This recharging aromatherapy massage oil is made in a base of sesame oil, with a refreshing blend of natural essential oils for a deep moisturising and energising effect on the body. 
 
Not for sale in the UK and Channel Islands. 
 KEY INGREDIENTS

name: Cherry Blossom Incense Sticks
description:
Pack of 10 incense sticks. A delicate fusion of soft Cherry Blossom, bright Bergamot, and rosy Geranium, grounded by the warm, subtly sweet depth of Tonka Bean. This balanced blend creates a fresh and comforting aroma, perfect for moments of quiet reflection. Each 8″ incense stick is handcrafted in-house with wood powder and natural gum resin, completely free from charcoal for a clean and natural burn. Infused with our proprietary fragrance, blended with pure essential oils, it fills your space with a light, uplifting scent. 
 Made with eco-friendly bamboo sticks and thoughtfully packaged in handmade recycled cotton paper with recyclable inner sleeves for lasting freshness. 
 No charcoal. No phthalates. Just pure, mindful fragrance. 
Burn time: 45 minutes per stick.
shortDescription:
Sweet,Flower, Fruity Fragrance 
8" Incense sticks are made in-house, which we roll with wood powder and gum resin, without charcoal. The finished sticks are then dipped into our proprietary fragrances, which have been blended with pure essential oils. We use eco bamboo sticks, handmade paper outer packing made from recycled cotton and recyclable double inner bags for best aroma retention. No Charcoal and No Phthalates. 
Burn Time:45 Minutes. 
 KEY INGREDIENTS
categories: Home Essences > Fragrance for Spaces > Incense > Encens D’auroville

name: Cedar Lavender Shaving Foam
description: This gentle, plant-based shaving foam is designed for a clean, close shave without irritation. Powered by soothing camphor hydrosol and naturally derived cleansers, it softens stubble while protecting the skin’s natural moisture barrier. Himalayan Cedarwood and Lavandin oils offer an earthy, aromatic experience that’s both calming and grounding. For skin that feels smooth, refreshed, and lightly scented—without the sting. \n
shortDescription:
Maroma Shaving Foam is refreshing, cooling, soothing and reduces irritation and razor burns. It soothes bumps and dry itchy skin after shaving. Free of parabens, silicone, phenoxyethanol and palm oil. 
 
Not for sale in the UK and Channel Islands.

These candles are made with paraffin wax and high quality fragrance blends to create a luxury experience whatever the occasion. Our pillar candles are available in an exciting range of colors, sizes and fragrances that fill your home with sensational scents. All colors used are food grade and our cotton wicks are self-trimming. 
 
The actual color of the candle may vary from the image on your screen

name: Double Scented Spiral Incense - Herbal Sanctuary
description:
A sensory journey through rich botanicals and resins—each spiral weaves two natural fragrances, blending seamlessly as they burn. This set offers five unique scent pairings, each designed to bring depth and balance to your space: 
 
 Juniper Berry / Siam Benzoin – Crisp and resinous 
 Rosemary / Opoponax – Herbal and meditative 
 Frankincense / Peru Balsam – Sacred and grounding 
 Lavender / Patchouli – Calming and earthy 
 Pine Needles / Lemon Verbena – Fresh and uplifting 
 
 With no bamboo or charcoal, these spirals burn cleanly, releasing their full aroma in a slow, evolving experience. 
 
 Includes a holder. 
 
 Burn time: 45 minutes per stick.

name: Double Scented Spiral Incense - Elemental Harmony
description:
A new way to experience incense—each spiral intertwines two complementary fragrances, blending as they burn for a layered, evolving aroma. This set includes five distinct scent pairings, offering a versatile experience for different moods and moments: 
 
 White Sage / Rock Rose – Purifying and grounding 
 Orange Zest / Cinnamon Bark – Warm and invigorating 
 Sandalwood / Vetiver – Deep and earthy 
 Himalayan Cedar / Elemi – Woody and uplifting 
 Myrrh / Yuzu – Mystical and bright 
 
 Made without bamboo or charcoal, these spirals provide a cleaner burn. Let the unique shape and carefully curated scents transform your space. 
 
 Includes a holder. 
 
 Burn time: 45 minutes per stick.

name: Ceramic Spiral Burner Star
description:
BENEFITS 
Create instantly an atmosphere of wellbeing and celebration with their varied scents of nature. 
 
 HOW TO USE 
Insert the coil onto the relevant metal support, making sure that there is enough space around it and that it is kept away from flammable materials, shelves, walls, and other sources of heat. Light the tip and extinguish the flame after a few seconds, making sure that its combustion continues. Make sure that the ash falling from the incense does not come into contact with delicate or varnished surfaces, or fabrics. Burn in well ventilated areas. Keep away from the reach of children and pets, and away from drafts. Let the product cool down completely before disposing of it. 
 
 FULL INGREDIENT LIST 
Wood dust*, Tree bark jiggat, Coconut shell powder and perfume *Small pieces from various woods used by carpenters are collected and processed to make a fine powder.
shortDescription: Spirals give the desired incense burning effect in a spiral shape and burn without flame for up to 6-7 hours. These unique and practical spirals need no special holders to use other than a metal stand. They are portable and can be placed outdoors or on large open patios to create instantly an atmosphere of wellbeing and celebration with their varied scents of nature. The fragrance is blended with natural essential oils. A complement to our normal household practices of lighting candles or incense. The two coils are intertwined and should be separated carefully to avoid breaking. \n KEY INGREDIENTS \n
categories: Home Essences > Fragrance for Spaces > Incense
Home Essences > Fragrance for Spaces > Incense > Perfume Spiral Incense

name: Yuzu Incense Sticks
description:
Pack of 10 incense sticks. A bright, citrus fragrance with the sparkling zest of yuzu, lime, lemon, and orange—fresh, uplifting, and energizing. Known for its ability to awaken the senses and clear the mind, this scent creates a joyful, revitalizing atmosphere. Each 8″ incense stick is handcrafted in-house with wood powders and natural tree bark, completely free from charcoal for a clean, natural burn. Infused with our proprietary fragrance, blended with pure essential oils, it fills your space with a crisp, luminous aroma. 
 Made with eco bamboo sticks and thoughtfully packaged in handmade recycled cotton paper with recyclable inner bags for lasting freshness. 
 
 No charcoal. No phthalates. Just pure, mindful fragrance. Burn time: 45 minutes per stick.
shortDescription:
Refreshing and Uplifting 
8" Incense sticks are made in-house, which we roll with wood powder and gum resin, without charcoal. The finished sticks are then dipped into our proprietary fragrances, which have been blended with pure essential oils. We use eco bamboo sticks, handmade paper outer packing made from recycled cotton and recyclable double inner bags for best aroma retention. No Charcoal and No Phthalates. 
Burn Time:45 Minutes.

 100% Natural Fragrance 
 Chemical & Toxin-Free 
 Travel-Friendly & Easy to Use

name: Baby Shampoo
description:
BENEFITS 
Restoring. 
 
 HOW TO USE 
Massage into wet hair and scalp, lather, and rinse thoroughly with warm water. 
 
 FULL INGREDIENT LIST 
 
Aqua(Demineralized water), Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract (Calendula Extract), Sodium lauroyl sarcocinate**, Disodium cocoamphodiacetate**, Coco glucoside (and) Glyceryl Oleate*, Sodium PCA**, Potassium sorbate**, Xanthan Gum, Citrus Aurantium Amara Oil(Petitgrain Oil), Citrus Aurantium Dulcis Oil (Orange Oil), Citrus Medica Limonum Oil (Lemon Oil), Mentha Piperita Oil (Peppermint) Oil, Cananga Odorata Oil (Ylang Ylang Oil), Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Oil (Rosemary Oil), Styrax Benzoin Extract (Styrax Resinoid), Ocimum Basillicum Oil (Basil Oil), Citrus Aurantium Amara Extract (Orange Flower Absolute), Jasminum Officinale Extract (Jasmine Absolute). *Eco Certified, ** Naturally Derived.
shortDescription:
Natural soothing & nurturing 
Maroma Baby shampoo, shower gel & bubble bath is a mild, gentle, non-stripping cleanser for the hair and body. Its no-tears, non irritating, extremely mild formula is safe and gentle for your baby. With a delicate natural fragrance. 
 
Our shampoo & bubble bath with calendula flower extracts and blend of natural essential oils of sweet orange oil, petitgrain oil & ylang ylang oil leaves the baby's hair soft & shiny and the body cleansed & moisturised. 
 
 Not for sale in the UK and Channel Islands. 
 KEY INGREDIENTS

name: Baby Body Lotion
description:
BENEFITS 
Natural moisturizing & soothing 
 
 HOW TO USE 
Apply on body and hands as often as needed. For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes.

Aqua(Di mineralized water), Olea Europaea Oil (Olive Oil)*, Persea Gratissima Oil(Avocado Oil), Surcrose Polystearate (and) Cetearyl Alcohol (and) Olea Europaea Oil Unsaponifiables*, Calendula Officinalis Flower Oil (Calendula Oil), Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil (Sunflower Oil), Glycerine, Olea Europaea Oil Unsaponifiables (Olive butter)*, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea butter)*, Potassium sorbate**, Xanthan gum, Citrus Aurantium Amara Oil(Petitgrain Oil), Citrus Aurantium Dulcis Oil (Orange Oil), Citrus Medica Limonum Oil (Lemon Oil), Mentha Piperita Oil (Peppermint) Oil, Cananga Odorata Oil (Ylang Ylang Oil), Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Oil (Rosemary Oil), Styrax Benzoin Extract(Styrax Resinoid), Ocimum Basillicum Oil (Basil Oil), Citrus Aurantium Amara Extract (Orange Flower Absolute), Jasminum Officinale Extract (Jasmine Absolute).* Certified Organic, ** Naturally Derived.
shortDescription:
Maroma Baby Lotion is gentle & specially formulated with natural ingredients to protect your baby's delicate and sensitive skin. Made with calendula extract, olive butter, shea butter, organic olive & avocado oil. It keeps the skin soft and healthy. No Parabens, No Palm Oil, No Phthalates Tested Invitro 
 
Not for sale in the UK and Channel Islands.

sku: Men Shaving Foam & After Shave gel
name: Shaving Foam & After Shave gel - Get 10ml Eau De Toilette free
description:
BENEFITS 
 
 HOW TO USE 
 
 FULL INGREDIENT LIST 
 
Shaving Foam 
 
Smooth shaving. 
 
Fights irritation. 
 
Softens beard & facial hair. 
 
Apply foam to damp face and shave with clean razor. 
 
Add more foam as needed during shaving. 
 
Aqua (Dimenaralized water), Caprylyl / Capryl Glucoside, Camphor Hydrosol, Lauryl Glucoside, Cocoamido Propyl Betain, Coco Glucoside (and) Glyceryl Oleate, Methyl Gluceth 20, Sodium PCA, Trehalose, Potassium Sorbate, Parfum(Fragrance), Cedrus Deodora Oil (Himalayan Cedarwood Oil), Lavandula Hybrida Oil(Lavandin Oil). 
 
After Shave Gel 
 
Anti-inflammatory. 
 
Nourishes & strengthens the skin. 
 
Wonderfully spicy and floral scent. 
 
After shaving, rinse your face thoroughly and pat dry with a clean hand towel. 
 
Pour out about a dime-sized amount of aftershave into the palm of your hand. 
 
Rub your hands together to ensure an even coating on both hands and rub thoroughly onto the surface of your skin. 
 
Aqua (Demineralized Water), Alcohol, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract (Aloe Extract), Panthenyl Triacetate, PEG -12 Dimethicone, Potassium Sorbate, Xanthan Gum, Melaleuca Alternifolia Leaf Oil (Tea Tree Oil), Lavendula Angustifolia Oil(Lavender Oil), Allantoin. 
 
Orange Patchouli Eau De Toilette for Man - 10ml 
 
Apply on pulse points. 
 
Alcohol Denat 80% v/v, Aqua (Water), Parfum (Fragrance), Limonene*, Hexyl Cinnamal, Citronellol*, Butylphenyl Methylpropional, Linalool*. *Natural.
shortDescription:
Buy 1 Shaving Foam & 1 After shave Gel 
Get a 10ml Orange Patchouli Eau De Toilette FREE 
 
 Not for sale in the UK and Channel Islands.

name: Turmeric Day & Cream - Get 10ml Hair Body Mist free
description:
BENEFITS 
- 
 
 HOW TO USE 
 
 FULL INGREDIENT LIST 
 
Night Cream 
 
Face Cream for night is specially formulated with Turmeric, Neem, Papaya and Pomegranate extracts. A moisturizer rich in natural antioxidants to last through the night. Formulated with an exceptional blend of herbal extracts and essential oils. 
 
Smooth gently onto face and neck until thoroughly absorbed to restore moisture and replenish your skin. 
 
Aqua(Demineralized Water), Sesamum Indicum Seed Oil (Sesame Oil), Linum Usitatissimum Seed Oil (Flax Seed Oil), Glyceryl Stearate, Cetyl alcohol, Glycerine, Stearic acid, Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil (Jojoba Oil), Punica Granatum Fruit Extract (Pomegranate Extract), Carica Papaya Fruit Extract (Papaya Extract), Acorus Calamus Root Extract (Calamus Root Extract) Rubia Cordifolia Root Extract(Manjistha Extract), Azadirachta Indica Leaf Extract (Neem Leaf Extract), Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Extract (Rosemary Extract), Simmondsia Chinensis Butter (Jojoba Butter), Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil Unsaponifiables (Almond Butter), Dehydroacetic Acid (and) Benzyl Alcohol*, Potassium hydroxide, Xanthan Gum, Cymbopogon Schoenthus Oil (Gingergrass Oil), Pinus Sylvestris Oil (Pine Oil), Cymbopogon Citratus Oil (Lemongrass Oil), Cymmbopogon Martini Oil (Palmarosa Oil), Cedrus Deodora Oil (Himalayan Cedarwood Oil), Citrus ParadisI Seed Oil (Grapefruit Oil), Citrus Aurantium Dulcis Oil (Sweet Orange Oil), Juniperus Communis Leaf Oil (Juniper Leaf Oil), Zingiber Officinale Root Oil (Ginger Oil), Cinnamomum Zeylanicum Leaf Oil (Cinnamon Leaf Oil), Piper Nigrum Seed Oil (Black Pepper Oil), Commiphora Myrrha Oil (Myrrh Absolute). *Eco cert approved Preservative. 
 
Day Cream 
 
Face Cream for day is specially formulated with Turmeric to deeply moisturize dry skin. Formulated with an exceptional blend of herbal extracts and essential oils. 
 
Smooth gently onto face and neck until thoroughly absorbed to restore moisture and replenish your skin. 
 
Aqua (Demineralized Water), Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil (Sunflower Oil), Cocos Nucifera Oil (Coconut Oil), Glyceryl Stearate, Cetyl alcohol, Glycerine, Stearic acid, Centella Asiatica Extract (Brahmi Extract), Tinospora Cordifolia Extract (Indian Berberine Extract), Asparagus Racemosus Root Extract (Shatavari Extract), Rubia Cordifolia Root Extract (Manjistha Extract), Phyllanthus Niruri Extract (Bhumyamlaki Extract), Prunus Armeniaca Kernel Oil (Apricot Oil), Olea Europaea Fruit Oil (Olive Oil), Cymbopogon Citratus Butter(Lemongrass Butter), Olea Europaea Fruit Unsaponifiables (Olive Butter), Potassium sorbate, Potassium Hydroxide, Xanthan Gum, Crocus Sativus Flower Extract (Saffron Extract), Citrus Aurantium Dulcis Oil (Sweet Orange Oil), Citrus Medica Limonum Oil (Lemon Oil) , Citrus Paradisi Seed Oil (Grapefruit Oil) , Pogostemon Cablin Oil (Patchouli Oil), Syzygium Aromaticum Leaf Oil(Clove Leaf Oil), Zingiber Officinale Root Oil (Ginger Oil), Cymbopogon Schoenthus Oil (Gingergrass Oil), Curcuma Longa Root Oil (Turmeric Oil), Ocimum Basilicum Leaf Oil(Tulsi Oil), Vetiveria Zizanoides Root Oil(Vetiver Oil), Nardostachys Chinensis Root Extract(Jatamansi Oil). 
 
 Hair & Body Mist -10ml 
 
Shake well before use & spritz your hair and body for an instant fragrance refresh. 
 
Aqua (Deminaralized water), Rosa Damascena Flower Water (Rose Water), Trehalose, Glycerine, Sodium PCA, DL Panthenol, Citrimonium Chloride, Methyl Gluceth-20, Potassium Sorbate, Xanthan Gum, pink berries perfume.

name: Incense Cone (P/2) & Ceramic Holder
description:
BENEFITS 
Reviving, Cleansing The result is a fresh and fragrant breath of unity that enhances the atmosphere and brings a room to life. 
 
 HOW TO USE 
Light the tip of the cone incense. Once lit, extinguish the flame immediately to allow the cone incense to smoulder. 
 
 FULL INGREDIENT LIST 
Wood powders, Macchilus Macaranth (Tree Bark Powder, a natural binder), Coco shell Powders, natural essential oils of Cypress, Cistus and Eucalyptus.
shortDescription:
KEY INGREDIENTS 
 
 
Cone Incense is certainly one of the most universal and pure methods of delivering the therapeutic benefits of fine incense. It also has the added advantage of being very compact and neat. One small cone delivers an amazing amount of pure aromatics but leaves behind just the smallest dollop of ash. We have selected our most popular aromatics for our cone incense collection. Fragrances blended inhouse with natural essential oils, mixed into a natural wood powder. 
Burn Time: 25 Minutes.

Aqua(Demineralized Water), Hibiscus Rosa Sinensis Flower Extract (Hibiscus Flower Extract), Sesamum Indicum Seed Oil(Sesame Oil), Sodium PCA*, Behentrimonium Chloride*, Cetrimonium Chloride*, Amodimethicone and Trideceth -12 and Cetrimonium Chloride*, Cetearyl Alcohol*, Cetyl Alcohol*, Olea Europaea Fruit Oil(Olive Oil), Ricinus Communis Seed Oil(Castor Oil), Activated Bamboo Charcoal Powder, Potassium Sorbate, Guar Gum, Boswellia Carteri Oil (Olibanum Oil), Cedrus Deodora Oil (Himalayan Cedar wood Oil), Pogostemon Cablin Oil(Patchouli Oil), Commiphora Myrrha Oil(Myrrh Oil), Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Oil (Rosemary Oil), Citrus Medica Limonum Oil(Lemon Oil), Ocimum Basilicum Oil (Basil Oil), Cymbopogon Martini Sofia Herb Oil (Ginger Grass Oil), Juniperus Communis Fruit Oil (Juniper Berry Oil), Pinus Sylvestris Oil (Pine Oil), Cyperus Scariosus Root Oil (Cypriol Oil). *Naturally derived 
 
 BENEFITS 
Balancing. 
 
 HOW TO USE 
Massage into wet hair and scalp, lather, and rinse thoroughly with warm water. 
 
 FULL INGREDIENT LIST 
 
Cocomidopropyl Betaine*, Rosemarinus Leaf Extract (Rosemary Extract),Trigonella Foenum Graecum seed Extract (Fenugreek Extract), Aqua(Demineralized Water), Caprylyl / Capryl Glucoside*, Disodium Cocoamphodiacetate*, Coco Glucoside*, Coco Glucoside (and) Glyceryl Oleate*, Trehalose*, Potassium Sorbate, Lavendula Angustifolia(Lavender Oil), Pelargonium Graveolens Oil (Geranium Oil), Citrus Bergamia Oil(Bergamot Oil). *Naturally derived
shortDescription:
Maroma's 100% Natural Bamboo Charcoal Hair Conditioner Continues the Detoxifying regime for the hair by removing unwanted build-up, chemicals, and other impurities that are damaging to your hair and detrimental to growth. Purging the hair This Conditioner is recommended for all hair types but especially for oily hair as Bamboo Charcoal absorbs oil and helps leave your hair tangle free. 
 KEY INGREDIENTS 
 
 
 Lavender : Balancing – Rosemary, Fenugreek Extract 
Bath Essential Shampoos are a pure blending of natural goodness containing fragrances made with essential oils and botanical extracts. We left out all the unnecessary stuff such as artificial preservatives and color. You won’t miss them. They just got in the way of our ingredients natural therapy. 
 KEY INGREDIENTS

name: Baby Lotion & Shampoo-Get Bamboo Puff free
description:
BENEFITS 
Natural moisturizing & soothing 
 
 HOW TO USE 
Apply on body and hands as often as needed. For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. 
 
 FULL INGREDIENT LIST 
 
Aqua(Di mineralized water), Olea Europaea Oil (Olive Oil)*, Persea Gratissima Oil(Avocado Oil), Surcrose Polystearate (and) Cetearyl Alcohol (and) Olea Europaea Oil Unsaponifiables*, Calendula Officinalis Flower Oil (Calendula Oil), Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil (Sunflower Oil), Glycerine, Olea Europaea Oil Unsaponifiables (Olive butter)*, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea butter)*, Potassium sorbate**, Xanthan gum, Citrus Aurantium Amara Oil(Petitgrain Oil), Citrus Aurantium Dulcis Oil (Orange Oil), Citrus Medica Limonum Oil (Lemon Oil), Mentha Piperita Oil (Peppermint) Oil, Cananga Odorata Oil (Ylang Ylang Oil), Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Oil (Rosemary Oil), Styrax Benzoin Extract(Styrax Resinoid), Ocimum Basillicum Oil (Basil Oil), Citrus Aurantium Amara Extract (Orange Flower Absolute), Jasminum Officinale Extract (Jasmine Absolute).* Certified Organic, ** Naturally Derived. 
 
 BENEFITS 
Restoring. 
 
 HOW TO USE 
Massage into wet hair and scalp, lather, and rinse thoroughly with warm water. 
 
 FULL INGREDIENT LIST 
 
Aqua(Demineralized water), Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract (Calendula Extract), Sodium lauroyl sarcocinate**, Disodium cocoamphodiacetate**, Coco glucoside (and) Glyceryl Oleate*, Sodium PCA**, Potassium sorbate**, Xanthan Gum, Citrus Aurantium Amara Oil(Petitgrain Oil), Citrus Aurantium Dulcis Oil (Orange Oil), Citrus Medica Limonum Oil (Lemon Oil), Mentha Piperita Oil (Peppermint) Oil, Cananga Odorata Oil (Ylang Ylang Oil), Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Oil (Rosemary Oil), Styrax Benzoin Extract (Styrax Resinoid), Ocimum Basillicum Oil (Basil Oil), Citrus Aurantium Amara Extract (Orange Flower Absolute), Jasminum Officinale Extract (Jasmine Absolute). *Eco Certified, ** Naturally Derived.
shortDescription:
Maroma Baby Lotion is gentle & specially formulated with natural ingredients to protect your baby's delicate and sensitive skin. Made with calendula extract, olive butter, shea butter, organic olive & avocado oil. It keeps the skin soft and healthy. No Parabens, No Palm Oil, No Phthalates Tested Invitro 
 KEY INGREDIENTS 
 
 
 Natural soothing & nurturing 
Maroma Baby shampoo, shower gel & bubble bath is a mild, gentle, non-stripping cleanser for the hair and body. Its no-tears, non irritating, extremely mild formula is safe and gentle for your baby. With a delicate natural fragrance. 
 
Our shampoo & bubble bath with calendula flower extracts and blend of natural essential oils of sweet orange oil, petitgrain oil & ylang ylang oil leaves the baby's hair soft & shiny and the body cleansed & moisturised. 
 
 Not for sale in the UK and Channel Islands. 
 KEY INGREDIENTS

name: Cosmos-5.34kg
description: Still Waters, a 5.3kg art candle, marries the realms of art and ambiance. Crafted with meticulous detail, this exquisite piece radiates still serenity and contemplation. When lit, the flame is an invitation to pause, reflect and go deeper within. Still Waters serves as a symbol of the beauty found in quiet moments, offering a sanctuary of peace and introspection. Its many layers, descend between high ‘cliffs’, down towards the profound stillness of the peaceful mind, allowing you to embark on a journey to your centre, finding solace in deeper depths where often, thoughts no longer exist.

name: Cranberry Mist Perfume Oil
description:
A refreshing blend that evokes well-being and cheer, Cranberry Mist begins with the sweet tangy brightness of tart berries, instantly awakening the senses. As the fragrance unfolds, the heart reveals the lush richness of Black Cherry, adding a touch of sweetness and depth. Finally, a grounding base of fern and moss lingers, bringing an earthy balance that leaves a fresh, harmonious finish. 
 
 
 Scent Profile: 
 
 
 Top Note: Tart Berries – A sharp, lively burst of freshness that sparks energy and awakens the senses. 
 Middle Note: Black Cherry – Rich and deep, adding a layer of sweet, sophisticated warmth. 
 Base Note: Fern and Moss – Earthy and green, grounding the fragrance with a calm, natural depth.
shortDescription:
A refreshing blend that evokes well-being and cheer, Cranberry Mist begins with the tangy brightness of tart berries, awakening the senses. The heart deepens with the richness of black cherry, adding a touch of sweetness and warmth. A grounding base of fern and moss brings a natural, earthy depth, leaving a refreshing and balanced finish. 
 
Perfect for those who embrace vitality and find joy in life’s vibrant moments. 
 
 Scent Profile 
 
 Top Note: Tart Berries – A sharp, tangy burst of freshness that awakens the senses. 
 
 Middle Note: Black Cherry – Rich and deep, adding a sweet yet slightly smoky fruitiness. 
 
 Base Note: Fern and Moss – Earthy and green, grounding the fragrance with a fresh, woody undertone.

name: Night Jasmine Perfume Oil
description:
A fragrance that captures the allure of a blooming night. It begins with a sweet floral note, soft and captivating, evoking the delicate beauty of Jasmine in full bloom. As the scent unfolds, fresh green notes and a hint of spice emerge, adding depth and intrigue. Finally, a warm, musky base lingers, leaving behind a sensual trail that stays with you long after the night fades. 
 
 
 Scent Profile: 
 
 
 Top Note: Sweet Floral – a gentle bloom of sweetness, soft and captivating. 
 Middle Note: Green, Spicy – Fresh, vibrant notes intertwine with a subtle spice, adding complexity and allure. 
 Base Note: Musky – A warm, earthy finish that grounds the fragrance, leaving a lingering, sensual impression.
shortDescription:
A fragrance that captures the allure of a blooming night. It opens with a sweet floral note, soft and captivating, evoking the beauty of jasmine in full bloom. The heart brings a fresh, spicy twist, with green notes that add an unexpected depth. A musky base lingers, leaving a warm, sensual trail that stays with you long after the night fades. 
 
 Scent Profile 
 
 Top Note: Sweet Floral – A soft, enchanting opening with a delicate, blooming sweetness. 
 
 Middle Note: Green, Spicy – A fresh, vibrant heart with an intriguing spicy edge, bringing complexity to the floral notes. 
 
 Base Note: Musky – A warm, earthy finish that adds depth and a sensual, lingering touch.

name: Strawberry Blush Perfume Oil
description:
A playful yet elegant perfume that captures the sweetness of ripe strawberries with a refined, citrus-kissed twist. Bright and uplifting, its fruity charm is softened by delicate floral undertones, creating a scent that feels both youthful and sophisticated. 
 
 Scent Profile: 
 
 
 Top Note: Sweet Orange – a burst of vibrant citrus, fresh and juicy, setting a lively and invigorating tone. 
 Middle Note: Peach Nectar – lush peach nectar unfolds with a smooth, velvety sweetness, adding depth and warmth. 
 Base Note: Sweet Mango – tropical mango lingers in a soft, sugary finish, leaving behind a lasting impression of playful sophistication.
shortDescription:
A playful yet elegant perfume that captures the sweetness of ripe strawberries with a refined, citrus-kissed twist. Bright and uplifting, its fruity charm is softened by delicate floral undertones, creating a scent that feels both youthful and sophisticated. 
 
 Scent Profile 
 
 Top Note: Sweet Orange – A vibrant, zesty opening that’s both fresh and juicy. 
 
 Middle Note: Peach Nectar – Lush and sweet, offering a smooth, fruity heart that’s rich yet soft. 
 
 Base Note: Sweet Mango – A tropical, sugary finish that adds warmth and a lasting sweetness.

name: Cherry Blossom Roll On/Perfume Oil
description:
Romantic and gently uplifting, Cherry Blossom is a modern floral with a sweet citrus twist. It begins with the bright, sparkling notes of Bergamot and citrus zest, awakening the senses. At its heart, dewy Pink Rose and soft Geranium petals bloom, bringing a graceful warmth. The fragrance settles into a velvety base of creamy Tonka, smooth Vanilla Bean, and a whisper of White Woods, creating a soft, lingering embrace. 
 
Scent profile: 
 
 Top Note: Bright Bergamot & Citrus Zest – Fresh and lively, offering a radiant opening burst. 
 Middle Note: Dewy Pink Rose & Soft Geranium Petals – Elegant and floral, with a soft romantic heart. 
 Base Note: Creamy Tonka, Vanilla Bean & White Woods – Warm and velvety, leaving a lasting, delicate finish.
shortDescription:
A perfume that unfolds with delicate floral notes, capturing the soft, fleeting beauty of sakura in bloom. Hints of sweetness mingle with a fresh, airy elegance, creating a scent that feels effortlessly graceful. 
 
 Scent Profile 
 
 Top Note: Fruity Citrus – A bright, refreshing start with a hint of juicy sweetness. 
 
 Middle Note: Pink Rose – Soft and elegant, adding a delicate floral touch with a subtle freshness. 
 
 Base Note: Tonka and Vanilla Beans – A warm, creamy finish that lingers with smooth depth.

name: Exotic Patchouli Perfume Oil
description:
Rich, earthy, and deeply grounding. Dry, sun-warmed soil sets the tone, giving way to a smooth balsamic warmth. A woody base lingers, adding depth and quiet intensity. Bold yet refined, it’s a scent that stays with you. 
 
 Scent Profile: 
 
 
 Top Note: Dry Earthy – The journey begins with the raw essence of sun-warmed soil, grounding and intriguing the senses. 
 Middle Note: Balsamic – At the heart, smooth resinous warmth unfolds, adding depth and a comforting richness. 
 Base Note: Woody – Finally, a lasting woody finish emerges, leaving a bold, refined impression that lingers with quiet intensity.
shortDescription:
Rich, earthy, and deeply grounding. Dry, sun-warmed soil sets the tone, giving way to a smooth balsamic warmth. A woody base lingers, adding depth and quiet intensity. Bold yet refined, it’s a scent that stays with you. 
 
 Scent Profile 
 
 Top Note: Dry Earthy – An intriguing, grounding start with the raw essence of sun-warmed soil. 
 
 Middle Note: Balsamic – Deepens the scent with a resinous warmth, adding a touch of smooth richness. 
 
 Base Note: Woody – A lasting, natural finish that brings depth and a sense of timeless allure.

name: Summer Berries Perfume Oil
description:
A warm, sun-kissed blend that captures the essence of ripe summer berries. Sweet, juicy notes brighten with a touch of citrus before melting into the soft warmth of vanilla, creating a fragrance that feels both playful and comforting. 
 
 
Scent Profile: 
 
 Top Note: The journey begins with fresh Melon, a cool burst of juicy sweetness kissed by the sun. 
 Middle Note: At the heart, Honey adds golden warmth, balancing freshness with natural richness. 
 Base Note: Finally, Creamy Vanilla lingers in a smooth, velvety finish, leaving behind soft, comforting depth
shortDescription:
A warm, sun-kissed blend that captures the essence of ripe summer berries. Sweet, juicy notes mingle with a touch of citrus and the soft warmth of vanilla, creating a scent that feels both playful and comforting. 
 
 Scent Profile 
 
 Top Note: Fresh Melon – A cool, juicy opening with a crisp, sun-kissed sweetness. 
 
 Middle Note: Honey – Adds a golden warmth, balancing the freshness with a touch of natural richness. 
 
 Base Note: Creamy Vanilla – A smooth, velvety finish that lingers with soft, comforting depth.

name: Wisdom
description:
From the vision of Paul Pinthon, Maroma’s Art Candles rise as sculpted poetry in wax. Each one-of-a-kind creation — shaped by hand or cast in form — turns light into art, and leftover wax into lasting beauty, inviting warmth, elegance, and wonder into your space. into lasting beauty, inviting warmth, elegance, and wonder into your space. 
 
 Wisdom shines with clarity and insight. Its flame honors reflection, understanding, and the depth that comes from experience. 
 
 Care Instructions 
 
 
 First Burn : Allow the entire top layer of wax to melt before extinguishing to ensure an even burn. 
 
 
 Wick Size : Keep the wick trimmed to 1/4 inch above the wax surface before every burn for an optimal flame. 
 
 
 Extinguishing : Suffocate the flame or dip the wick into the melted wax and straighten. 
 
 
 Longevity : With proper care, your art candle can burn beautifully for months, while retaining its sculptural presence.
shortDescription: Wisdom is the shadow-play of experience cast by the flame of knowledge. Wisdom’s light knows that we are all essentially the same being, that a smile is understood by all cultures and that nothing is more important that kindness and compassion.
categories: Home Essences > Ambience & Decor > Art Candles

name: Wild Pomegranate Perfume Oil
description:
A bold, captivating fragrance that celebrates the luscious depth of Pomegranate. Juicy, ruby-red notes open with a sparkling brightness before softening into a warm, velvety finish. Both indulgent and effortlessly elegant, it evokes a scent that lingers like a memory. 
 
Scent profile: 
 
 Top Note: The journey begins with crisp Red Cherry, a radiant burst of tart sweetness that feels juicy and uplifting. 
 Middle Note: At the heart, Tart Peach unfolds with succulent vibrancy, mellowing into a lush, rounded embrace. 
 Base Note: Finally, Green Apple anchors the fragrance with a crisp, refreshing undertone that deepens its character and extends its lasting presence.
shortDescription:
A bold and captivating fragrance inspired by the luscious depth of pomegranate. Juicy, ruby-red notes are brightened with a touch of citrus and softened by a warm, velvety finish. A scent that feels both indulgent and effortlessly elegant. 
 
 Scent profile 
 
 Top Note: Crisp Red Cherry – A burst of brightness with a juicy, tart touch. 
 
 Middle Note: Tart Peach – Adds a tangy sweetness, mellowing into a lush aroma. 
 
 Base Note: Green Apple – Finishes with a fresh, crisp undertone, adding depth and longevity.

name: Summer Berries Deodorant
description: This deodorant captures the essence of summer with the warm, fruity scent of Summer Berries, blended with sweet Orange, creamy Vanilla, and a hint of Cinnamon for a cozy twist. Refreshing yet slightly indulgent, it’s perfect for those who love a playful, sun-kissed fragrance that feels like summer all year round. \n \nThis gentle deodorant combines the soothing properties of Aloe Extract and Organic Coconut Oil to keep skin soft and hydrated, while Sodium Bicarbonate provides reliable, long-lasting odor protection—without stickiness or residue.
shortDescription:
This fresh & fruity roll-on deodorant inspired by summer berries leaves you feeling fresh and delicately scented throughout the day. With a non sticky, non greasy formula, it’s ideal for all day protection. 98% Natural. 
 
No alcohol, No aluminium Salts or Parabens.

name: Strawberry Blush Deodorant
description: Enjoy the cheerful, sweet scent of Strawberry, paired with bright notes of Orange and the soft florals of Palmarosa and Lavandin. This fragrance is fresh, light, and vibrant, ideal for those who love a fruity twist with a touch of floral elegance. \n \nFormulated with Aloe Extract and Organic Coconut Oil to soothe and moisturize, this deodorant uses Sodium Bicarbonate to neutralize odor naturally, providing reliable protection without stickiness or residue.
shortDescription:
This fresh & fruity roll-on deodorant inspired by sweet summer strawberries leaves you feeling fresh and delicately scented throughout the day. With a non sticky, non greasy formula, it’s ideal for all day protection. 98% Natural 
 
No alcohol, No aluminium Salts or Parabens.

name: Peach Blossom Deodorant
description: Wrap yourself in the soft, uplifting fragrance of Peach Blossom, brightened with a hint of zesty Lemon and the cozy warmth of Tonka Bean. This balanced aroma feels fresh yet subtly sweet, and present without being overpowering. \n \nFormulated with soothing Aloe Extract and hydrating Organic Coconut Oil, this deodorant nourishes the skin while Sodium Bicarbonate naturally neutralizes odor, ensuring all-day freshness with no stickiness or residue.
shortDescription:
This fresh & floral roll-on deodorant inspired by tender peach blossoms leaves you feeling fresh and delicately scented throughout the day. With a non sticky, non greasy formula, it’s ideal for all day protection. 98% Natural 
 
No alcohol, No aluminium Salts or Parabens.

name: Cherry Blossom Deodorant
description: Infused with a delicate Cherry Blossom fragrance inspired by the cherry blossoms of Japan, this deodorant is brightened with fresh Bergamot and Geranium and balanced by the soft warmth of Tonka Bean. \n \nAloe Extract and Organic Coconut Oil hydrate and soothe the skin, while the lightweight formula glides on effortlessly without stickiness or residue. Light and refreshing, it’s designed to keep you comfortable and confident from morning to night.
shortDescription: This fresh & floral roll-on deodorant inspired by Japanese cherry blossoms leaves you feeling fresh and delicately scented throughout the day. With a non sticky, non greasy formula, it’s ideal for all day protection. 98% Natural \n

name: Apple Blossom Scented Candle - 300gms
description:
HOW TO USE 
 
 Light the bottom of the wick with a flame. 
 Let the top wax become liquid when burning the 1st time. 
 Blow out the wick or bend it with a knife into the hot liquid wax to extinguish the flame.

name: Vanilla Votive - 70gms
description:
Wrap your space in the soft glow of love with this delicately scented vanilla votive candle. Hand-poured and wrapped in artisanal mulberry paper, it’s a celebration of warmth, comfort, and romance. The rich, creamy aroma of vanilla lingers gently, creating an atmosphere of intimacy and serenity—perfect for quiet evenings or heartfelt moments. Thoughtfully crafted, this limited edition candle is a simple yet meaningful way to express love this Valentine’s Day. 
 
Key Elements: 
• Warm, comforting vanilla fragrance 
• Wrapped in handcrafted mulberry paper 
• A romantic touch for Valentine’s Day

name: Togetherness Gift Set
description:
An intimate duo designed to brighten spaces with warmth and affection. 
 
 
 
 Pink Rose-Shaped Candle : A delicate rose sculpted in wax, glowing with softness and love. 
 
 
 Artisan Paper Wrapping : Each candle is hand-poured and lovingly wrapped in handmade mulberry paper, bringing the touch of mindful craftsmanship. 
 
 
 A simple yet thoughtful gesture — perfect for celebrating closeness and shared moments.
shortDescription:
A hand-poured red candle, kissed by a soft pink rose. This candle speaks of love’s beauty 
and the elegance of nature, perfect for creating a romantic ambiance. 
 
An elegant duo, thoughtfully curated to illuminate your space with love: 
• Pink Rose-Shaped Candle – A delicate rose in wax, crafted to bring softness and warmth 
to any moment. 
• Handpoured in Handmade pink artisan paper, this candle offers a peaceful glow, wrapped 
in the beauty of loving handicraft.

name: All You Need Gift Set
description:
A playful yet tender expression of love, wrapped in delicate florals and soft radiance. 
 
 
 
 Cherry Blossom Hair & Body Mist : A refreshing mist infused with the gentle sweetness of cherry blossoms, leaving a trail of elegance. 
 
 
 Heart-Shaped Rose Soap : A luxurious cleansing bar with the timeless fragrance of rose, softening skin and spirit alike. 
 
 
 Flower-Shaped Pink Candle : A glowing bloom, radiating warmth and romance in flickering light. 
 
 
 Handcrafted Paper Rose : A sustainable keepsake, symbolizing beauty, care, and the eternity of love. 
 
 
 Because sometimes, all you need is a little fragrance, a little glow, and a whole lot of love.
shortDescription:
A curated set to indulge the senses with the elegance of love: 
 
•Cherry Blossom Hair & Body Mist – A mist that captures the fresh, delicate scent of 
cherry blossoms, wrapping you in a soft embrace. 
• Heart-Shaped Rose-Scented Soap – A luxurious soap, infused with the timeless fragrance 
of rose, offering nourishment and love in every tiny bubble. 
• Flower-Shaped Pink Candle – A warm, glowing flower, radiating romance with it 
flickering light 
• Handcrafted Paper Rose – A lasting symbol of beauty and love, carefully crafted to 
remind you of love’s eternal bloom.

description:
Rich, alluring, and full of mystery, this set evokes the passion and depth of twilight hours. 
 
 
 
 Wild Pomegranate Perfume (10ml) : A bold, juicy fragrance that stirs the senses with its vibrant and sensual notes, leaving a lasting impression. 
 
 
 Heart-Shaped Candle : Hand-poured to ignite warmth, its glow reflects the intimacy of deep connection. 
 
 
 Paper Roses : Everlasting blossoms of elegance, symbolizing love that thrives beyond fleeting moments. 
 
 
 A gift of passion and intrigue — perfect for nights steeped in romance and celebration.

invigorate, perfect for relaxation at any moment. 
• Handcrafted Paper Rose – A delicate symbol of enduring love, crafted with sustainability 
in mind, to complement the spirit of this set.

name: Spring Into Love Gift Set
description:
A tender ode to affection, this giftset celebrates the beauty of love in all its forms. 
 
 
 
 Spring Rose Perfume (10ml) : A fragrant embrace of spring, capturing the delicate essence of blooming roses. Its soft, lingering scent dances in the air like a whispered promise of love. 
 
 
 Heart-Shaped Candle : A hand-poured symbol of affection, casting a warm glow that mirrors the tenderness within. 
 
 
 Paper Roses : Timeless blooms crafted with care, standing as a sustainable reminder of love’s enduring beauty. 
 
 
 Whether for a partner, a cherished friend, or yourself, this set makes every moment bloom with romance.
shortDescription:
A celebration of love, grace, and timeless beauty, this set includes: 
 
•Spring Rose Perfume (10ml) – A fragrant embrace of spring, capturing the delicate 
essence of blooming roses. Its soft, lingering scent dances in the air like a whispered 
promise of love.

light on every moment, while the shape of a heart reflects the tenderness within

A perfect tribute to love, whether for a partner, a friend, or yourself.

name: Peru Balsam Incense Sticks
description:
A grounding blend of rich Peru balsam, harmonised with the sweet floral notes of ylang ylang and the earthy depth of patchouli. This calming fragrance fills your space with soothing warmth and tranquility. Hand-rolled with wood powder and natural gum resin for a clean, charcoal-free burn. 
 Eco-friendly packaging with handmade recycled cotton paper and recyclable inner bags to keep the fragrance fresh. 
 100% natural. No charcoal. No phthalates. Just pure, mindful fragrance. 
Burn time: 45 minutes per stick.
shortDescription:
Soothing & Balancing 
8" Incense sticks are made in-house, which we roll with wood powder and gum resin, without charcoal. The finished sticks are then dipped into our proprietary fragrances, which have been blended with pure essential oils. We use eco bamboo sticks, handmade paper outer packing made from recycled cotton and recyclable double inner bags for best aroma retention. No Charcoal and No Phthalates. 
Burn Time:45 Minutes. 
 KEY INGREDIENTS
categories: Home Essences > Fragrance for Spaces > Incense > Encens D’auroville

name: Tender Jasmine Potpourri
description: Like a quiet morning in a jasmine-filled garden, this blend of delicate petals, seed pods, and leaves brings a soft, natural elegance to your space. The muted greens, earthy browns, and pale golden hues mirror the gentle essence of its fragrance—fresh, floral, and soothing. Infused with natural essential oils, it slowly releases its scent, creating a serene atmosphere that lingers beautifully.
shortDescription: Potpourri created specially to bring Nature closer to our hearts with a rich treasure trove of colors, textures and fragrances. A delightful collection of nature’s gifts – seeds, pods, flowers and leaves, blended together with carefully chosen fine and wonderful fragrances which are mixed with natural essential oils. A unique way to add a touch of natural splendor to homes and interiors. \n KEY INGREDIENTS \n

With natural rattan reeds ensuring a steady diffusion, this diffuser brings an enduring sense of serenity and elegance, lingering even after the liquid is gone.

name: Turmeric Night Cream
description:
Our Turmeric Night Cream blends nature’s finest botanicals to restore and rejuvenate your skin while you sleep. Sesame and Flax Seed Oils provide deep nourishment and moisture, while Pomegranate and Papaya Extracts gently brighten and support your skin’s natural glow. 
 Jojoba Butter and Almond Butter add a rich, creamy texture, enveloping your skin in a comforting layer of hydration. Enhanced with a calming blend of essential oils, including Himalayan Cedarwood, Palmarosa, and Gingergrass, this cream promotes balance and relaxation, helping you wake up to softer, smoother, and more radiant skin.
shortDescription:
SOOTHING & REJUVENATING

Lightweight Coconut and Sunflower Oils absorb effortlessly to hydrate without heaviness, while Brahmi, Shatavari, and Manjistha Extracts help balance and restore vitality. Enriched with Saffron and Turmeric, it enhances brightness and leaves skin with a soft, healthy glow throughout the day. 
 Uplifting aromas of Sweet Orange, Lemon, and Grapefruit invigorate the senses, making this day cream the perfect start to any daily ritual.

GLOWING & REJUVENATING

description:

Olive Wax and Kokum Butter work together to soften and smooth, helping to keep your skin feeling refreshed and resilient throughout the day. 
 This light, non-greasy formula combines Ylang Ylang and Peppermint Oils to awaken your senses while keeping your skin balanced and comfortable. Ideal for everyday use, it’s a simple, natural way to keep your skin moisturized and cared for.

NOURISHING & MOISTURISING

description:
Pamper your skin each night with our 100% Natural Coconut Night Cream, designed to deeply nourish and restore. Organic cold-pressed Coconut Oil, combined with Aloe and Cucumber Extracts, provides soothing hydration that helps soften and calm your skin after a long day. Shea and Mango Butters add a rich, creamy texture, sealing in moisture for a rejuvenated feel by morning. 
 Enhanced with nutrient-rich Avocado and Sweet Almond Oils, it nurtures your skin’s natural glow and elasticity. Ylang Ylang and Peppermint Oils add a refreshing scent, making this cream the perfect way to unwind and indulge your skin every night.

name: Sun Screen Day Cream with SPF 30
description:
This lightweight formula protects against harmful UV rays while delivering soothing care with Lavender and Himalayan Cedarwood oils. Sunflower and Olive Oils nourish and lock in moisture, while antioxidant-rich Celery Seed and Mandarin Orange Peel Oils keep your skin refreshed throughout the day. 
 A unique blend of natural oils, including Vetiver and Petitgrain, provides a calmimg effect while offering daily sun protection. Enjoy a healthy, protected complexion, and feel confident every time you step outside.

name: Retinol Night Cream
description:
Packed with the power of Retinol (Vitamin A), this cream works while you sleep to promote smoother, brighter skin and reduce the appearance of fine lines. Sunflower and Almond Oils nourish and soften, while the calming effects of Lavender, Geranium, and Rosemary Oils bring balance to your nighttime skincare routine. 
 Turmeric and Carrot Seed Oils target skin imperfections and support a healthy, glowing complexion. With the luxurious scents of Rosewood and Sandalwood, this cream transforms your evening routine into a soothing self-care ritual. Wake up to skin that feels nourished, revitalised, and refreshed.

name: Earth and Wood Incense Assortment 100% Natural
description:
Sandalwood, Pine, Cedarwood, Patchouli & Lemongrass – 100% Natural - Pack of 10 incense sticks (2 of each fragrance) 
 
 A grounding collection inspired by the richness of the earth and the freshness of the forest. Smooth Sandalwood, crisp Pine, and warm Cedarwood mingle with the deep, resinous notes of Patchouli and the bright lift of Lemongrass. Together, they create a serene and restorative atmosphere, perfect for moments of calm and reflection. Each 8″ incense stick is handcrafted in-house using wood powder and natural gum resin, completely free from charcoal for a clean, natural burn. Infused with our proprietary fragrances, blended with pure essential oils, this set delivers a pure and mindful aromatic experience. 
 No charcoal. No phthalates. Just nature’s essence. 
Burn time: 45 minutes per stick.
shortDescription:
Sweet, Flower, Fruity Fragrance 
8" Incense sticks are made in-house, which we roll with wood powder and gum resin, without charcoal. The finished sticks are then dipped into our proprietary fragrances, which have been blended with pure essential oils. We use eco bamboo sticks, handmade paper outer packing made from recycled cotton and recyclable double inner bags for best aroma retention. No Charcoal and No Phthalates. 
Burn Time:45 Minutes. 
 KEY INGREDIENTS

name: Golden Amber Roll On/Perfume Oil
description:
Radiant and grounding, Golden Amber opens with rich, fruity citrus, awakening the senses with a bright, uplifting energy. The heart unfolds into tropical floral notes, adding lush, vibrant depth. Finally, smooth woody Amber, enhanced by the subtle glow of Labdanum and Cypriol, settles in, wrapping the fragrance in a warm, calming embrace. 
 
 
 Scent Profile: 
 
 
 Top Note: Rich, Fruity Citrus – Bright and uplifting, creating an invigorating opening. 
 Middle Note: Tropical Floral – Lush and vibrant, adding depth and radiance. 
 Base Note: Smooth Woody Amber – Warm and grounding, with Labdanum and Cypriol adding subtle calm.
shortDescription: This golden amber perfume is blended with natural essential oils and comes in a handy take-along roll-on applicator, ideal for your purse or pocket. \n KEY INGREDIENTS \n

name: Desert Blooms Roll On/Perfume Oil
description:
Inspired by rare desert wildflowers kissed by sunlight, Desert Blooms is a bright yet grounded fragrance. It opens with sparkling citrus, and Mandarin Oil, awakening the senses with a fresh, lively energy. The heart reveals cool, Balsamic notes that add depth and balance, before settling into a warm, rich base of Amber resins and soft Patchouli, leaving a lasting trail. 
 
 
 Scent Profile: 
 
 Top Note: Sparkling Citrus & Mandarin Oil – A bright, zesty opening that energizes and delights. 
 Middle Note: Fresh Balsamic Notes – Cooling and balanced, adding depth and subtle intrigue. 
 Base Note: Amber Resins & Soft Patchouli – Warm, rich, and grounding, leaving a long-lasting, earthy finish.
shortDescription: This golden amber perfume is blended with natural essential oils and comes in a handy take-along roll-on applicator, ideal for your purse or pocket. \n KEY INGREDIENTS \n

name: Champak Pillar Candle
description:
Rich, golden, and deeply floral—this candle captures the opulent fragrance of champak blossoms in full bloom. Hand-poured with essential oils, it fills your space with a luxurious and uplifting aroma. 
 
 Fragrance Notes: Intense, sweet florals with warm, honeyed undertones 
 
 Wick: Pure cotton for a clean, steady burn 
 
 Burn Time: 12 hrs (Small), 36 hrs (Medium), 78 hrs (Large)
shortDescription: 100% Hand Crafted. The pillar candles make a great decorative statement in your home. Elegant and striking, these candles make wonderful center pieces for your table. These candles are made with paraffin wax and high quality fragrance blends to create a luxury experience whatever the occasion. Our pillar candles are available in an exciting range of colors, sizes and fragrances that fill your home with sensational scents. All colors used are food grade and our cotton wicks are self-trimming. \n KEY INGREDIENTS \n
