name: Lemongrass Bambooless Incense
description:
A vibrant blend of lemongrass, gingergrass, and palmarosa essential oils creates a bright, citrusy aroma that awakens the senses. Without a bamboo core, this bambooless incense burns smoothly, allowing the pure, crisp fragrance to unfold without interference. The energizing scent clears the mind, enhances focus, and refreshes any space with its naturally uplifting presence. 
 
 Handcrafted with wood powder and natural resins, infused with 100% natural fragrance—free from charcoal for a clean, lasting burn. 
Includes a holder. 
Burn time: 60 minutes per stick.
shortDescription:
Fill up your space with these 100% natural fragrances. Bamboless Incense is made by hand without Bamboo Stick. The fragrance is blended in the wood powder paste without any charcoal. This product contains 20 sticks with holder. 
Burn Time:60 Minutes. 
 KEY INGREDIENTS

name: Coconut Soap Bar with Coconut Scrub & Mango Butter
description: This Coconut soap bar is made with essential oils in a base of moisturising mango butter. Organic coconut oil nourishes skin, the coconut scrub gently exfoliates, giving the skin a fresh radiance. Soothing, gently cleansing, with a hint of refreshing peppermint oil and tropical ylang ylang oil.
shortDescription:
Hand crafted, natural, cold-pressed and triple-milled rejuvenating scrub soap with moringa a leafy green, known to awaken and rejuvenate the skin, in a base of organic coconut oil blended with creamy kokum butter and other vegetable oils. Our added Aromatherapy blend of essential oils makes it good for the skin and good for the senses. No synthetic fragrance or Colors. No Palm Oil. 
 
Not for sale in the UK and Channel Islands. 
 KEY INGREDIENTS

name: Eternal Light Gift Set
description: Illuminate your celebrations with the Eternal Light Gift Set , a radiant blend of fragrance and tradition. This set features Kalki Blessing incense — a graceful harmony of delicate florals and warm woods that creates a sacred, serene atmosphere. Accompanied by three handcrafted terracotta diya candles adorned with golden detail, five incense leaves, and a holder, it brings peace, devotion, and the warm glow of Diwali’s eternal light into your home.

name: Sacred Radiance Gift Set
description: The Sacred Radiance Gift Set embodies strength, focus, and festive devotion. It includes Kalki Victory incense , a crisp, vibrant blend of fresh greens that awakens the senses and inspires renewal. Four beautifully handcrafted terracotta diyas with golden accents and a graceful incense holder complete this set, making it a radiant companion for rituals, prayers, and celebrations filled with light.

name: Festival Harmony Gift Set
description: Celebrate togetherness with the Festival Harmony Gift Set , crafted to bring balance and joy to your festivities. Featuring four uniquely designed terracotta diyas adorned with gold, eight incense leaves, and an incense holder, it pairs luminous tradition with the soothing presence of natural fragrance. A harmonious blend of light, color, and aroma — perfect for gatherings, rituals, and creating cherished festive moments.

name: Festive Aura Gift Set
description: Celebrate the season with the Festive Aura , a gift set that blends color, fragrance, and tradition. Three vibrant incense packs — Strawberry Blush , a playful, fruity sweetness; Into the Night , a mysterious, velvety aroma; and Sandalwood , timelessly grounding — offer a variety of moods to match the moment. Each pack includes 10 sticks for a lasting aromatic experience. \n The set is completed with three handcrafted terracotta diyas, echoing the festive theme of red, orange, and blue , bringing warmth and color to your celebrations. A thoughtful balance of fragrance and light, perfect for gifting or creating a joyous, fragrant atmosphere in your home.

name: Roses and Radiance Gift Set
description: The Roses and Radiance Gift Set is a graceful celebration of light and beauty. Three handcrafted terracotta diyas bring the warm glow of tradition, while three delicately sculpted rose-shaped candles add a touch of floral elegance. Together, they create a simple yet striking harmony — perfect for adorning festive spaces or gifting as a symbol of love, light, and renewal.

name: Festive Florals Gift Set
description:
Bright, playful, and full of color, the Festive Florals Gift Set captures the joy of togetherness and the freshness of blooms in the air. 
 
 
 
 Incense Sticks (Cherry Blossom, Apple Blossom, Strawberry, Cranberry, Pomegranate, Pinkberry) : A rainbow of fragrances, from fruity sweetness to floral elegance, each stick uplifting the mood and spirit. 
 
 
 Silver Incense Holder : A sleek, elegant accessory to complement the fragrances, adding a touch of sophistication to your festive rituals. 
 
 
 This set is a joyful tribute to fragrance and festivity — a perfect companion for evenings of light, laughter, and love.

name: Devi Gift Set – The Spirit of Divine Fragrance
description:
Celebrate the essence of strength, calm, and wisdom this Diwali with the Devi Giftset — a soulful curation of incense and perfumes inspired by the many faces of the divine feminine. 
 
 
 
 Incense Sticks (Audacity, Serenity, Mastery) : Three distinct fragrances, each crafted to awaken courage, invite peace, and inspire inner mastery. 
 
 
 Perfume Oils : Pocket-sized treasures that echo the same themes of power, grace, and balance, enveloping you in fragrance wherever you go. 
 
 
 Housed in a beautifully screen printed box, this gift set is a tribute to spirit and celebration — perfect for gifting light, strength, and fragrance this festive season.

name: Kalki Gift Set - Light & Fragrance for the Festive Season
description:
Celebrate Diwali with a harmonious blend of glow and aroma. The Kalki Giftset brings together the elegance of handcrafted votives and the soulful fragrance of incense, making it a thoughtful gift of light and serenity. 
 
 
 
 4 Handcrafted Votives : Made from 100% vegetable wax and wrapped in ornate patterned paper, these candles radiate a warm, golden glow that enhances every festive moment. 
 
 
 8 Incense Leaves : Delicately shaped and infused with rich fragrance, these incense leaves create a soothing atmosphere, perfect for prayers, meditation, or quiet evenings of celebration. 
 
 
 Encased in a vibrant floral box, the Kalki Giftset is a celebration of tradition, sustainability, and the joy of gifting — a perfect way to share light and love this Diwali.

name: Pink Lotus Pillar Candle
description: A serene and graceful fragrance, this candle captures the soft floral elegance of blooming lotus with a gentle, dewy sweetness. Hand-poured with essential oils, it creates an atmosphere of calm balance and quiet beauty. \n Fragrance Notes: Delicate lotus with subtle aquatic and floral undertones Wick: Pure cotton for a clean, steady burn Burn Time: 12 hrs (Small), 36 hrs (Medium), 78 hrs (Large) \n
shortDescription: 100% Hand Crafted. The pillar candles make a great decorative statement in your home. Elegant and striking, these candles make wonderful center pieces for your table. These candles are made with paraffin wax and high quality fragrance blends to create a luxury experience whatever the occasion. Our pillar candles are available in an exciting range of colors, sizes and fragrances that fill your home with sensational scents. All colors used are food grade and our cotton wicks are self-trimming. \n KEY INGREDIENTS \n

name: Golden Amber Roll On/Perfume Oil
description:
Radiant and grounding, Golden Amber opens with rich, fruity citrus, awakening the senses with a bright, uplifting energy. The heart unfolds into tropical floral notes, adding lush, vibrant depth. Finally, smooth woody Amber, enhanced by the subtle glow of Labdanum and Cypriol, settles in, wrapping the fragrance in a warm, calming embrace. 
 
 
 Scent Profile: 
 
 
 Top Note: Rich, Fruity Citrus – Bright and uplifting, creating an invigorating opening. 
 Middle Note: Tropical Floral – Lush and vibrant, adding depth and radiance. 
 Base Note: Smooth Woody Amber – Warm and grounding, with Labdanum and Cypriol adding subtle calm.
shortDescription: This golden amber perfume is blended with natural essential oils and comes in a handy take-along roll-on applicator, ideal for your purse or pocket. \n KEY INGREDIENTS \n

name: Wild Pomegranate Roll On/Perfume Oil
description:
A bold, captivating fragrance that celebrates the luscious depth of Pomegranate. Juicy, ruby-red notes open with a sparkling brightness before softening into a warm, velvety finish. Both indulgent and effortlessly elegant, it evokes a scent that lingers like a memory. 
 
Scent profile: 
 
 Top Note: The journey begins with crisp Red Cherry, a radiant burst of tart sweetness that feels juicy and uplifting. 
 Middle Note: At the heart, Tart Peach unfolds with succulent vibrancy, mellowing into a lush, rounded embrace. 
 Base Note: Finally, Green Apple anchors the fragrance with a crisp, refreshing undertone that deepens its character and extends its lasting presence.
shortDescription:
A bold and captivating fragrance inspired by the luscious depth of pomegranate. Juicy, ruby-red notes are brightened with a touch of citrus and softened by a warm, velvety finish. A scent that feels both indulgent and effortlessly elegant. 
 
 Scent profile 
 
 Top Note: Crisp Red Cherry – A burst of brightness with a juicy, tart touch. 
 
 Middle Note: Tart Peach – Adds a tangy sweetness, mellowing into a lush aroma. 
 
 Base Note: Green Apple – Finishes with a fresh, crisp undertone, adding depth and longevity.

name: Summer Berries Roll On/Perfume Oil
description:
A warm, sun-kissed blend that captures the essence of ripe summer berries. Sweet, juicy notes brighten with a touch of citrus before melting into the soft warmth of vanilla, creating a fragrance that feels both playful and comforting. 
 
 
Scent Profile: 
 
 Top Note: The journey begins with fresh Melon, a cool burst of juicy sweetness kissed by the sun. 
 Middle Note: At the heart, Honey adds golden warmth, balancing freshness with natural richness. 
 Base Note: Finally, Creamy Vanilla lingers in a smooth, velvety finish, leaving behind soft, comforting depth
shortDescription:
A warm, sun-kissed blend that captures the essence of ripe summer berries. Sweet, juicy notes mingle with a touch of citrus and the soft warmth of vanilla, creating a scent that feels both playful and comforting. 
 
 Scent Profile 
 
 Top Note: Fresh Melon – A cool, juicy opening with a crisp, sun-kissed sweetness. 
 
 Middle Note: Honey – Adds a golden warmth, balancing the freshness with a touch of natural richness. 
 
 Base Note: Creamy Vanilla – A smooth, velvety finish that lingers with soft, comforting depth.

name: Exotic Patchouli Roll On/Perfume Oil
description:
Rich, earthy, and deeply grounding. Dry, sun-warmed soil sets the tone, giving way to a smooth balsamic warmth. A woody base lingers, adding depth and quiet intensity. Bold yet refined, it’s a scent that stays with you. 
 
 Scent Profile: 
 
 
 Top Note: Dry Earthy – The journey begins with the raw essence of sun-warmed soil, grounding and intriguing the senses. 
 Middle Note: Balsamic – At the heart, smooth resinous warmth unfolds, adding depth and a comforting richness. 
 Base Note: Woody – Finally, a lasting woody finish emerges, leaving a bold, refined impression that lingers with quiet intensity.
shortDescription:
Rich, earthy, and deeply grounding. Dry, sun-warmed soil sets the tone, giving way to a smooth balsamic warmth. A woody base lingers, adding depth and quiet intensity. Bold yet refined, it’s a scent that stays with you. 
 
 Scent Profile 
 
 Top Note: Dry Earthy – An intriguing, grounding start with the raw essence of sun-warmed soil. 
 
 Middle Note: Balsamic – Deepens the scent with a resinous warmth, adding a touch of smooth richness. 
 
 Base Note: Woody – A lasting, natural finish that brings depth and a sense of timeless allure.

name: Cherry Blossom Roll On/Perfume Oil
description:
Romantic and gently uplifting, Cherry Blossom is a modern floral with a sweet citrus twist. It begins with the bright, sparkling notes of Bergamot and citrus zest, awakening the senses. At its heart, dewy Pink Rose and soft Geranium petals bloom, bringing a graceful warmth. The fragrance settles into a velvety base of creamy Tonka, smooth Vanilla Bean, and a whisper of White Woods, creating a soft, lingering embrace. 
 
Scent profile: 
 
 Top Note: Bright Bergamot & Citrus Zest – Fresh and lively, offering a radiant opening burst. 
 Middle Note: Dewy Pink Rose & Soft Geranium Petals – Elegant and floral, with a soft romantic heart. 
 Base Note: Creamy Tonka, Vanilla Bean & White Woods – Warm and velvety, leaving a lasting, delicate finish.
shortDescription:
A perfume that unfolds with delicate floral notes, capturing the soft, fleeting beauty of sakura in bloom. Hints of sweetness mingle with a fresh, airy elegance, creating a scent that feels effortlessly graceful. 
 
 Scent Profile 
 
 Top Note: Fruity Citrus – A bright, refreshing start with a hint of juicy sweetness. 
 
 Middle Note: Pink Rose – Soft and elegant, adding a delicate floral touch with a subtle freshness. 
 
 Base Note: Tonka and Vanilla Beans – A warm, creamy finish that lingers with smooth depth.

name: Strawberry Blush Roll On/Perfume Oil
description:
A playful yet elegant perfume that captures the sweetness of ripe strawberries with a refined, citrus-kissed twist. Bright and uplifting, its fruity charm is softened by delicate floral undertones, creating a scent that feels both youthful and sophisticated. 
 
 Scent Profile: 
 
 
 Top Note: Sweet Orange – a burst of vibrant citrus, fresh and juicy, setting a lively and invigorating tone. 
 Middle Note: Peach Nectar – lush peach nectar unfolds with a smooth, velvety sweetness, adding depth and warmth. 
 Base Note: Sweet Mango – tropical mango lingers in a soft, sugary finish, leaving behind a lasting impression of playful sophistication.
shortDescription:
A playful yet elegant perfume that captures the sweetness of ripe strawberries with a refined, citrus-kissed twist. Bright and uplifting, its fruity charm is softened by delicate floral undertones, creating a scent that feels both youthful and sophisticated. 
 
 Scent Profile 
 
 Top Note: Sweet Orange – A vibrant, zesty opening that’s both fresh and juicy. 
 
 Middle Note: Peach Nectar – Lush and sweet, offering a smooth, fruity heart that’s rich yet soft. 
 
 Base Note: Sweet Mango – A tropical, sugary finish that adds warmth and a lasting sweetness.

name: Night Jasmine Roll On/Perfume Oil
description:
A fragrance that captures the allure of a blooming night. It begins with a sweet floral note, soft and captivating, evoking the delicate beauty of Jasmine in full bloom. As the scent unfolds, fresh green notes and a hint of spice emerge, adding depth and intrigue. Finally, a warm, musky base lingers, leaving behind a sensual trail that stays with you long after the night fades. 
 
 
 Scent Profile: 
 
 
 Top Note: Sweet Floral – a gentle bloom of sweetness, soft and captivating. 
 Middle Note: Green, Spicy – Fresh, vibrant notes intertwine with a subtle spice, adding complexity and allure. 
 Base Note: Musky – A warm, earthy finish that grounds the fragrance, leaving a lingering, sensual impression.
shortDescription:
A fragrance that captures the allure of a blooming night. It opens with a sweet floral note, soft and captivating, evoking the beauty of jasmine in full bloom. The heart brings a fresh, spicy twist, with green notes that add an unexpected depth. A musky base lingers, leaving a warm, sensual trail that stays with you long after the night fades. 
 
 Scent Profile 
 
 Top Note: Sweet Floral – A soft, enchanting opening with a delicate, blooming sweetness. 
 
 Middle Note: Green, Spicy – A fresh, vibrant heart with an intriguing spicy edge, bringing complexity to the floral notes. 
 
 Base Note: Musky – A warm, earthy finish that adds depth and a sensual, lingering touch.

name: Cranberry Mist Roll On/Perfume Oil
description:
A refreshing blend that evokes well-being and cheer, Cranberry Mist begins with the sweet tangy brightness of tart berries, instantly awakening the senses. As the fragrance unfolds, the heart reveals the lush richness of Black Cherry, adding a touch of sweetness and depth. Finally, a grounding base of fern and moss lingers, bringing an earthy balance that leaves a fresh, harmonious finish. 
 
 
 Scent Profile: 
 
 
 Top Note: Tart Berries – A sharp, lively burst of freshness that sparks energy and awakens the senses. 
 Middle Note: Black Cherry – Rich and deep, adding a layer of sweet, sophisticated warmth. 
 Base Note: Fern and Moss – Earthy and green, grounding the fragrance with a calm, natural depth.
shortDescription:
A refreshing blend that evokes well-being and cheer, Cranberry Mist begins with the tangy brightness of tart berries, awakening the senses. The heart deepens with the richness of black cherry, adding a touch of sweetness and warmth. A grounding base of fern and moss brings a natural, earthy depth, leaving a refreshing and balanced finish. 
 
Perfect for those who embrace vitality and find joy in life’s vibrant moments. 
 
 Scent Profile 
 
 Top Note: Tart Berries – A sharp, tangy burst of freshness that awakens the senses. 
 
 Middle Note: Black Cherry – Rich and deep, adding a sweet yet slightly smoky fruitiness. 
 
 Base Note: Fern and Moss – Earthy and green, grounding the fragrance with a fresh, woody undertone.

name: Opium Flower Roll On/Perfume Oil
description:
Daring and sensual, Opium Flower is a bold oriental floral infused with warmth. It opens with the rich, comforting heat of Cinnamon and exotic spice, drawing you in with its intoxicating allure. At the heart, Crimson Rose and resin-rich Myrrh add depth and opulence. The fragrance settles into a smoldering base of dry Cedarwood, soft Amber, and smoky earth, leaving behind a velvety, lingering trail. 
 
 
Scent Profile: 
 
 
 Top Note: Warm Cinnamon & Exotic Spice – A fiery, aromatic opening full of warmth and intrigue. 
 Middle Note: Crimson Rose & Resin-Rich Myrrh – Deep, romantic florals balanced with rich, resinous depth. 
 Base Note: Dry Cedarwood, Soft Amber & Smoky Earth – A smoldering, velvety finish that lingers on the skin.
shortDescription: This aromatic collection remains one of the most popular in our line. The bottles may be small but they contain numerous applications of our highly concentrated fragrances. \n KEY INGREDIENTS \n

name: Night Blossom Roll On/Perfume Oil
description:
A deep, velvety floral with a sensual edge, Night Blossom begins with the richness of Red Rose—lush, romantic, and undeniably timeless. The heart blooms into soft Tuberose, its creamy warmth adding depth and allure. As the fragrance settles, a base of mystic woods, infused with Olibanum and guaiac wood, casting a smoky, resinous aura that feels both grounding and mysterious. A fragrance that lingers like a whispered secret—elegant, intimate, and unforgettable. 
 
 Scent Profile: 
 
 
 Top Note: Red Rose – Bold and velvety, evoking classic romance and luxury. 
 Middle Note: Soft Tuberose – Creamy and luminous, adding depth and sensuality. 
 Base Note: Mystic Woods – A smoky, resinous blend of Olibanum and guaiac wood, deep and enduring.
shortDescription:
A deep, velvety floral with a sensual edge, Night Blossom opens with the richness of red rose—lush, opulent, and undeniably romantic. The heart unfolds into soft tuberose, its creamy glow adding warmth and depth. As it lingers, a base of mystic woods, touched with olibanum and guaiac wood, casts a smoky, resinous aura that feels both grounding and elusive. 
 
A fragrance that lingers like a whispered secret—elegant, intimate, and unforgettable. 
 
 Scent Profile 
 
 Top Note: Red Rose – A bold, velvety floral that exudes timeless romance. 
 
 Middle Note: Soft Tuberose – Creamy and luminous, adding depth and sensuality. 
 
 Base Note: Mystic Woods – A smoky, resinous blend of olibanum and guaiac wood, deep and lingering.

It opens with the sweetness of creamy Vanilla touched with bright citrus, creating a playful and uplifting start. As it unfolds, subtle spices of Cinnamon Leaf and Clove emerge, adding gentle warmth and complexity. name: Spring Rose Roll On/Perfume Oil
description:
Bright, floral, and quietly powerful, Spring Rose opens with sparkling Citrus and light Geranium, awakening the senses with a fresh, uplifting brightness. The heart unfolds into petal-fresh Rose Absolute blended with soft green herbs, adding a graceful, aromatic elegance. Finally, earthy Vetiver, dry woods, and a hint of damp moss settle in, grounding the fragrance with a natural, enduring depth. 
 
 
 Scent Profile: 
 
 
 Top Note: Sparkling Citrus & Light Geranium – A lively, bright opening that energizes and refreshes. 
 Middle Note: Petal-Fresh Rose Absolute & Soft Green Herbs – Elegant and floral, with a gentle herbal nuance. 
 Base Note: Earthy Vetiver, Dry Woods & Damp Moss – Grounding and natural, leaving a lasting, sophisticated finish.
shortDescription: Step into a world where romance meets intrigue. Rose Attar centers on a lush bouquet of rose absolute, its deep, velvety petals unfolding into a complex tapestry of scent. Blue chamomile adds a soothing whisper of calm, while geranium lends a green, uplifting nuance that dances gracefully with the floral heart. A hint of amyris introduces a subtle woody embrace, perfectly complemented by the crisp vibrancy of palmarosa. Finally, a dash of clove weaves in a warm, spicy intrigue, making this fragrance an evocative journey of passion and serenity all at once.

name: Jasmine Essential Gift Set
description: A soft and uplifting floral experience. \n The Jasmine Essential Gift Set captures the delicate fragrance of blooming jasmine — a scent known to calm the mind and uplift the spirit. This set includes a 100% vegetable wax votive wrapped in elegant patterned paper, paired with incense leaves and a holder for a simple, soothing ritual.

name: Champak Essential Gift Set
description: Exotic, rich, and grounding. \n The Champak Essential Gift Set celebrates the deep, golden aroma of the champaka flower — warm, meditative, and full of character. This thoughtful set includes a vegetable wax votive candle wrapped in patterned paper, incense leaves, and a holder to bring peace and presence to your space.

name: Desert Dunes Essential Gift Set
description: Warm, earthy, and serene. \n \n The Desert Dunes Essential Gift Set evokes the stillness of open landscapes and sunlit sands. Its subtly spicy and woody aroma creates a grounding atmosphere. Each set includes a vegetable wax votive wrapped in patterned paper, incense leaves, and a holder — perfect for quiet reflection.

name: Lavender Essential Gift Set
description: Classic calm for every day. \n The Lavender Essential Gift Set brings the soothing scent of lavender to your space — fresh, floral, and deeply relaxing. With its vegetable wax votive, incense leaves, and holder, this set is a gentle companion for winding down and restoring balance.

name: Pine Essential Gift Set
description: Crisp, green, and refreshing. \n The Pine Essential Gift Set captures the invigorating scent of forest air and evergreen leaves. Its clean, natural fragrance renews the senses. Includes a 100% vegetable wax votive wrapped in patterned paper, incense leaves, and holder — a perfect touch of nature indoors.

name: Rose Essential Gift Set
description: Elegant and romantic. \n The Rose Essential Gift Set surrounds you with the gentle sweetness of rose petals — a timeless fragrance that soothes the heart and lifts the mood. With a 100% vegetable wax votive, incense leaves, and holder, it’s a graceful addition to any space or moment of self-care.

name: Yoga Essential Gift Set
description: Grounding and restorative. \n Created to accompany moments of mindfulness, the Yoga Essential Gift Set includes a 100% vegetable wax votive and soothing cone incense. Ideal for meditation, yoga, or quiet reflection, it’s a beautifully simple ritual to help you reconnect with calm.

name: Peach Blossom Shampoo with Aloe Vera Extract
description: Infused with the delicate scent of Peach Blossom and warm Vanilla, this gentle shampoo revitalizes hair with every wash. Aloe Vera Extract soothes and hydrates the scalp, while Organic Coconut Oil delivers deep nourishment and natural shine. Olibanum and Cassia Leaf Oils help purify and balance, leaving hair soft, smooth, and naturally refreshed. \nFormulated with mild, plant-based cleansers, this shampoo produces a rich, creamy lather that cleanses without stripping away natural oils. Vanilla Absolute adds a comforting warmth to the subtle floral aroma, making every wash feel like a luxurious ritual.
shortDescription:
Natural Cleansing Ingredients 
Our delicately scented Peach Blossom Shower Gel with aloe vera extract & natural essential oils gently cleanses the skin while leaving it soft, moisturised and refreshed. 
 
Free of parabens, phthalates, sulfates, synthetic fragrance & artificial color. 100% Natural and vegan 
 
Not for sale in the UK and Channel Islands. 
 KEY INGREDIENTS

Lightweight yet deeply conditioning, this formula restores balance and vitality to all hair types.

name: Elemi Incense Sticks
description:
Pack of 10 incense sticks. A graceful blend of Jasmine absolute, brightened by the uplifting citrus notes of Bergamot and the exotic sweetness of Ylang Ylang. This refined fragrance creates an atmosphere of grace and serenity, perfect for relaxation and self-care. Each 8″ incense stick is handcrafted in-house with wood powder and natural gum resin, completely free from charcoal for a clean and natural burn. Infused with our proprietary fragrance, blended with pure essential oils, it fills your space with a rich and meditative scent. 
 
Made with eco-friendly bamboo sticks and thoughtfully packaged in handmade recycled cotton paper with recyclable inner sleeves for lasting freshness. 
No charcoal. No phthalates. Just pure, mindful fragrance. 
Burn time: 45 minutes per stick.
shortDescription:
Sweet, Flower, Fruity Fragrance 
8" Incense sticks are made in-house, which we roll with wood powder and gum resin, without charcoal. The finished sticks are then dipped into our proprietary fragrances, which have been blended with pure essential oils. We use eco bamboo sticks, handmade paper outer packing made from recycled cotton and recyclable double inner bags for best aroma retention. No Charcoal and No Phthalates. 
Burn Time:45 Minutes. 
 KEY INGREDIENTS

name: Neem Shikakai Shampoo
description: An energizing herbal shampoo crafted for oily or fine hair. This balancing formula combines the purifying benefits of Neem and Shikakai with cooling Tulsi and a revitalizing blend of Ginger, Orange, and Grapefruit essential oils. It refreshes the scalp, lifts away excess buildup, and leaves hair feeling clean, weightless, and naturally voluminous.

name: Neem Shikakai Conditioner
description: A lightweight botanical conditioner crafted especially for oily or fine hair. Powered by the purifying benefits of Neem and Shikakai, this balancing formula nourishes without weighing hair down. Sesame and Olive oils replenish essential moisture, while an uplifting blend of energizing essential oils helps clarify the scalp and restore natural volume. Hair feels fresh, soft, and full of life after every wash.

name: Neem Shikakai Shower Gel
description: Awaken your body and mind with this cooling, energizing shower gel. Neem and Shikakai help cleanse and refresh the skin, while stimulating Ginger, Orange, and Grapefruit essential oils uplift the senses. The result: skin that feels purified, revitalized, and renewed with every shower.

name: Aloe Vera Hibiscus Shower Gel
description: A gentle daily cleanser ideal for sensitive or overheated skin. Aloe Vera cools and hydrates, while Hibiscus helps tone and refine. The soft floral fusion of Lavandin, Rose, Geranium, and Ylang Ylang brings a sense of calm and balance, leaving skin feeling fresh, comforted, and beautifully renewed.

name: Aloe Vera Hibiscus Conditioner
description: A calming, restorative conditioner for dry or weakened hair. Aloe Vera and Hibiscus deeply hydrate and soften, while Sesame and Olive oils smooth, protect, and enhance shine. A tranquil blend of Rose, Geranium, Ylang Ylang, and Lavandin essential oils soothes the senses, promoting a balanced scalp and silky, nourished hair.

name: Aloe Vera Hibiscus Shampoo
description: A gentle, cooling shampoo designed to comfort scalp sensitivity and nourish dry hair. Infused with soothing Aloe Vera, conditioning Hibiscus, and a serene floral blend of Lavandin, Geranium, Rose, and Ylang Ylang, it promotes relaxation while leaving hair soft, refreshed, and delicately fragranced.

name: Moringa Lime Shampoo
description: A moisturizing, soothing shampoo that comforts dryness and nurtures the scalp. Enriched with hydrating, antioxidant-rich Moringa extract and gently stimulating Lime, it helps restore balance to dry or irritated scalps. Hair is left feeling soft, pampered, and naturally refreshed.

name: Moringa Lime Conditioner
description: A rich, soothing conditioner formulated to restore moisture and softness to dry or fragile hair. Moringa extract nourishes and hydrates, while Lime offers a fresh, uplifting touch. Sesame and Olive oils deliver long-lasting moisture and deep nourishment, helping to smooth, strengthen, and restore balance to the hair and scalp.

name: Moringa Lime Shower Gel
description: A gentle, deeply moisturizing shower gel ideal for dry or sensitive skin. Moringa soothes, softens, and replenishes, while Lime lightly refreshes and uplifts. This nourishing blend leaves skin supple, comforted, and beautifully hydrated after every wash.

name: Desert Blooms Roll On/Perfume Oil
description:
Inspired by rare desert wildflowers kissed by sunlight, Desert Blooms is a bright yet grounded fragrance. It opens with sparkling citrus, and Mandarin Oil, awakening the senses with a fresh, lively energy. The heart reveals cool, Balsamic notes that add depth and balance, before settling into a warm, rich base of Amber resins and soft Patchouli, leaving a lasting trail. 
 
 
 Scent Profile: 
 
 Top Note: Sparkling Citrus & Mandarin Oil – A bright, zesty opening that energizes and delights. 
 Middle Note: Fresh Balsamic Notes – Cooling and balanced, adding depth and subtle intrigue. 
 Base Note: Amber Resins & Soft Patchouli – Warm, rich, and grounding, leaving a long-lasting, earthy finish.

name: Winter Musk Roll On/Perfume Oil
description:
A serene and introspective blend, Winter Musk opens with light Jasmine and fresh Fern, gently awakening the senses with a calm, uplifting brightness. The heart unfolds into mossy greens with a hint of smoky Vetiver, adding depth and a quiet complexity. Finally, deep earthy Patchouli with subtle muskiness settles in, wrapping the fragrance in a grounding, tranquil embrace. 
 
 
 Scent Profile: 
 
 
 Top Note: Light Jasmine & Fresh Fern – A gentle, uplifting opening that refreshes and calms. 
 Middle Note: Mossy Greens & Smoky Vetiver – Deep and complex, adding serene sophistication. 
 Base Note: Deep Earthy Patchouli & Subtle Muskiness – Grounding and enduring, leaving a quiet, peaceful trail.

name: Radiant Turmeric Day Complex Face Cream
description:
Brightening, Nourishing, Balancing 
 
 
 
Designed to illuminate and even the complexion, this lightweight day complex blends Turmeric Root Extract with Niacinamide to visibly brighten skin, reduce dullness, and support a healthy skin barrier.A refined infusion of Brahmi, Licorice, Manjistha, and Bhumyamalaki extracts helps calm inflammation, enhance clarity, and promote a more balanced skin tone, while Vitamin C (Sodium Ascorbyl Phosphate) offers antioxidant protection and boosts natural radiance. 
 
Nourishing plant oils and butters—including Olive, Apricot, Coconut, and Lemongrass Butter—deliver lasting hydration without heaviness, leaving skin soft, smooth, and comfortable throughout the day. Subtle notes of citrus, turmeric, and grounding botanicals gently refresh the senses. 
 
Perfect for everyday use, the Radiant Turmeric Day Complex supports brighter, calmer, and resilient-looking skin.
shortDescription:

name: Radiant Turmeric Night Complex Face Cream
description:
Brightening, Renewal, Deep Nourishment, Skin Barrier Support 
 
 
 
A restorative night treatment that supports skin renewal while you sleep, the Radiant Turmeric Night Complex blends Turmeric Root Extract and Niacinamide to help refine texture, improve clarity, and revive tired-looking skin by morning. 
 
Plant-based collagen works alongside Pomegranate Seed Oil, Ashwagandha, Manjistha, and Heart-Leaved Moonseed to replenish moisture, strengthen the skin barrier, and calm daily stress on the skin. Gentle AHA fruit extracts encourage natural exfoliation, revealing smoother, more luminous skin over time. 
 
Rich yet breathable oils and butters—including Flaxseed, Sesame, Almond, and Jojoba—deliver deep nourishment without heaviness, while a grounding blend of botanical essential oils creates a soothing nighttime ritual for both skin and senses. 
 
Ideal for evening use, this night complex helps restore balance, radiance, and resilience while you rest.

name: Coco Essence Day Complex Face Cream
description:
Barrier Strengthening, Deeply Nourishing, Daily Hydration 
 
 
 
Coco Essence Day Complex is a lightweight daily moisturizer that strengthens the skin barrier while restoring softness and balance. Organic Coconut Oil and Niacinamide work together to nourish, smooth, and refine skin texture without heaviness.Advanced barrier-supporting actives—peptides, pro-ceramides, and cholesterol—help improve resilience against daily environmental stressors, while Indian Barberry and Vitamin C promote clarity and a healthy, even-toned glow. 
 
Jojoba Oil, Olive Squalane, and Sesame Oil provide lasting hydration and comfort, leaving skin supple and radiant throughout the day. A subtle blend of Ylang Ylang and Peppermint adds a gentle freshness to the experience. 
 
Ideal for everyday use, this day complex leaves skin calm, hydrated, and naturally luminous.

name: Coco Essence Night Complex Face Cream
description:
Deeply Nourishing, Barrier Repair, Overnight Renewal 
 
 
 
This nourishing night cream supports skin repair and renewal while you sleep, enveloping the skin in deep hydration and comfort. Organic Coconut Oil and Aloe Vera soothe and replenish, while Niacinamide helps refine texture and support a healthy, balanced complexion.Bakuchiol, a gentle plant-based alternative to retinol, works overnight to improve skin smoothness and firmness without irritation. Hyaluronic Acid restores moisture levels, leaving skin plump and refreshed by morning. Apricot, Avocado, and Almond oils—blended with Shea and Mango butters—deliver lasting nourishment without heaviness. 
 
A ceramide-rich complex and peptides strengthen the skin barrier, helping skin feel resilient, soft, and well-rested. Light botanical notes of Ylang Ylang and Peppermint add a subtle freshness to this calming nighttime ritual. 
 
Perfect for nightly use, Coco Essence Night Complex leaves skin feeling hydrated, supple, and visibly renewed by morning.

name: Retinol Renewal Night Complex Face Cream
description:
Renewing, Firming & Lifting, Barrier Support 
 
 
 
This advanced night cream works while you sleep to renew, firm, and restore skin, leaving it visibly smoother and radiant by morning. Bakuchiol, a gentle plant-based alternative to retinol, stimulates skin renewal without irritation, while Lupine Peptides and Niacinamide improve elasticity and even out texture. 
 
Infused with Water Lily extract and potent botanical oils—including Almond, Sunflower, and Coconut-derived emollients —this cream deeply nourishes and replenishes the skin while supporting its natural barrier. Ceramides and essential lipids fortify the skin overnight, while light floral and herbal notes of Geranium, Lavender, and Patchouli offer a subtle, soothing aroma. 
 
Perfect for nightly use, Retinol Renewal Night Complex enhances skin resilience, hydration, and firmness, leaving your complexion rejuvenated and naturally glowing.

name: Saffron Elixir Serum
description:
Brightening & Radiance, Deep Hydration, Barrier Support 
 
A luminous serum that brightens, hydrates, and strengthens the skin, Saffron Elixir combines the radiant power of Saffron with hydrating hyaluronic acid and skin-replenishing pro-ceramides. Water Lily extract soothes and balances, while Aloe provides a light, cooling touch to leave skin refreshed and supple. 
 
This lightweight elixir absorbs quickly, delivering essential moisture, promoting a smooth, glowing complexion, and supporting the skin’s natural barrier. Subtle floral notes lend a delicate, elegant aroma, making this serum a luxurious addition to your daily skincare ritual. 
 
Perfect for morning and evening use, Saffron Elixir supports hydrated, radiant, and resilient skin.
shortDescription:
This under-eye serum is gentle yet effective, created to tackle puffiness, dark circles, and fine lines. Enriched with Water Lily extract and Cucumber extract, it works to soothe and refresh the delicate skin around your eyes, giving it a rested, well-hydrated look. 
 
The formula is boosted with Quinoa Seed extract to help firm and smooth the skin, while Vitamin E provides antioxidant protection. The blend of essential oils, including Lavender, Geranium, and Rosemary, adds a calming touch, supporting the serum’s overall rejuvenating effects. 
 
Designed for daily use, this serum gives your eyes a well-deserved boost, leaving them looking brighter and more awake. Perfect for anyone looking to bring back that natural glow and keep tired eyes at bay! 
 
Not for sale in the UK and Channel Islands. 
 KEY INGREDIENTS

A revitalizing serum that deeply hydrates, brightens, and restores natural radiance, Hydra Glow Elixir combines the antioxidant power of Turmeric with Licorice and Bearberry extracts to even skin tone and reduce dullness. Hyaluronic Acid delivers lasting moisture while Aloe soothes and refreshes the skin, leaving it plump, smooth, and luminous. 
 
Lightweight and fast-absorbing, this elixir enhances the skin’s natural glow while supporting a resilient, healthy-looking complexion. Subtle botanical and citrus notes create a calming, uplifting aroma, making it a luxurious daily essential. 
 
Perfect for morning and evening use, Hydra Glow Elixir promotes radiant, hydrated, and balanced skin.

name: Take Care of Yourself with Ayurveda
description:
Written by Ayurvedic practitioner Dr Be, this book is a gentle and accessible introduction to Ayurveda as a guide for everyday well-being. It invites you to listen to your body, understand its signals, and cultivate balance before imbalance turns into illness. 
 Blending traditional Ayurvedic wisdom with modern insights, Take Care of Yourself with Ayurveda offers a holistic approach to health, self-care, and conscious living. 
 A thoughtful companion for anyone seeking greater harmony in body, mind, and daily life. 
 No. of pages: 183 pages

Its soft pink hue and sculpted heart form make it as beautiful to display as it is to burn. Designed to bring serenity into everyday spaces, this candle is a thoughtful gift or a quiet indulgence for yourself. 
 
 Fragrance: Lotus 
 
 Mood: Calm • Serene • Meditative

name: Maroma Spa ₹1000 Gift Voucher
description:
Gift the gift of restoration. The ₹1000 Maroma Spa Gift voucher is redeemable on any treatment at Maroma Spa, allowing the recipient to choose their preferred therapy - from deep relaxation to targeted therapeutic care. Beautifully designed and easy to redeem, the Maroma Gift Voucher is the perfect gift for birthdays, anniversaries, corporate gifting, or just a great way to express appreciation to your loved ones. It comes as a digital certificate and as an optional printed voucher (just let us know) for you to hand over in person.

name: Sandalwood Shampoo - 100ml
description:
Balances Scalp · Prevents Dryness · Improves Hair Softness 
 
 
 
 
 A balancing cleanser infused with warm Sandalwood and restorative botanicals, this shampoo gently purifies while maintaining the scalp’s natural moisture barrier. Mild plant-derived cleansers remove buildup without stripping, leaving hair fresh, soft, and comfortably clean. 
 
Brahmi and Turmeric extracts support scalp health and vitality, while Organic Coconut Oil and Kokum Butter help prevent dryness and improve hair texture. The rich, resinous blend of Sandalwood, Cedarwood, Cypriol, and Benzoin creates a deeply grounding aroma that lingers subtly. 
 
Ideal for regular use, Sandalwood Shampoo leaves hair smooth, balanced, and naturally radiant.

name: Himalayan Cedarwood Conditioner - 100ml
description:
Deeply Conditions · Reduces Frizz · Enhances Natural Shine 
 
 
 
 
 A nourishing conditioner that smooths, softens, and detangles while supporting scalp comfort. Lightweight conditioning agents restore manageability without weighing hair down. 
 
Sesame, Olive, and Castor replenish moisture and enhance natural shine, while Oats and Calendula extracts soothe and protect. The signature Himalayan Cedarwood blend leaves hair delicately scented with deep, woody warmth. 
 
Ideal for regular use, this conditioner leaves hair smooth, resilient, and effortlessly manageable.

name: Himalayan Cedarwood Shampoo - 100ml
description:
Gentle Cleansing · Scalp Soothing · Moisture Balance 
 
 
 
A gentle yet effective cleanser, Himalayan Cedarwood Shampoo purifies the scalp while maintaining natural moisture balance. Mild plant-based cleansers remove buildup without stripping, leaving hair feeling fresh, light, and comfortably clean. 
 
Oats and Calendula extracts soothe the scalp and help reduce dryness or irritation, while Sodium PCA and Trehalose support hydration and softness. The grounding aroma of Himalayan Cedarwood, blended with Guaiacwood and Oakmoss, transforms your daily wash into a calming ritual. 
 
Ideal for regular use, this shampoo leaves hair refreshed, balanced, and subtly scented with warm woody notes.

name: Sandalwood Conditioner - 100ml
description:
Deeply Conditions · Reduces Frizz · Enhances Shine 
 
 
 
 
 A nourishing conditioner that smooths, softens, and restores shine while supporting scalp comfort. Lightweight conditioning agents detangle effortlessly without weighing hair down. 
 
Sesame, Olive, and Castor oils replenish moisture and enhance gloss, while Brahmi and Turmeric extracts help maintain scalp balance. The deep Sandalwood blend leaves hair delicately scented with warm, resinous elegance. 
 
Perfect for regular use, it leaves hair silky, manageable, and visibly healthier.

name: Himalayan Cedarwood Shower Gel - 100ml
description:
Gently Cleanses · Prevents Dryness · Soothes Sensitive Skin 
 
 
 
 A refreshing body cleanser that purifies while preserving the skin’s natural moisture. This gentle, plant-based formula cleanses effectively without drying, leaving skin smooth and comfortable. 
 
Enriched with Oats and Calendula extracts, it helps soothe and soften the skin, while Sodium PCA supports hydration. The rich, woody blend of Himalayan Cedarwood, Guaiacwood, and Oakmoss envelops the senses in a warm, forest-inspired aroma. 
 
Perfect for daily use, it leaves skin clean, refreshed, and subtly scented.

name: Sandalwood Shower Gel - 100ml
description:
Cleanses Without Drying · Soothes Skin · Grounding Aroma 
 
 
 
 
 A comforting body cleanser that envelops skin in a warm Sandalwood, woody lather while cleansing without dryness. Gentle coconut-derived cleansers lift impurities, leaving skin fresh and supple. 
 
Brahmi and Turmeric extracts help calm and support skin clarity, while Organic Coconut Oil preserves softness. The signature Sandalwood blend adds a refined, grounding finish to your daily shower ritual. 
 
Suitable for everyday use, it leaves skin clean, balanced, and subtly scented.
